Name: Beast Basher
Description: A powerful pick modified to add an extra helping of hurt to beast family monsters.

Name: Hatchet
Description: A heavy blade used to chop vines and foliage in the wilderness surrounding the Rescue Camp.

Name: Proto Blade
Description: A swift, compact utility blade issued to all Spiral Knight recruits.

Name: Proto Sword
Description: A small sword issued to all Spiral Knight recruits.

Name: Robo Wrecker
Description: A wrench-like tool thought to be of gremlin design.  Though its origin is mysterious, its abilty to destroy constructs is well-documented.

Name: Slime Slasher
Description: A sturdy shovel modified to dole out a little extra damage to slime family monsters.

Name: Big Beast Basher
Description: It was suggested that this brutally sharp mining pick could probably be used to hunt both beasts AND minerals. The Clockworks were never the same.

Name: Bolted Blade
Description: An upgraded Proto Sword reinforced with bronze bolts scavenged from the Clockworks.

Name: Heavy Hatchet
Description: A big blade intended to fell trees. Unsurprisingly, you can also use it to fell enemies, blocks, mineral deposits and most anything else you'd care to hit with it.

Name: Hot Edge
Description: A modified Proto Sword capable of generating temperatures high enough to burn organic material.

Name: Red Saber
Description: A saber the color of the burning sun that is given to knights who have shown exemplary bravery in past actions.

Name: Prototype Rocket Hammer
Description: Designed by Warmaster Seerus himself, this nefarious gremlin weapon is equipped with a rocket engine that can launch the wielder forward with a powerful hammer smash.  This particular model is a prototype version.

Name: Rugged Robo Wrecker
Description: An upgraded robo wrecker that has assisted a great many constructs in becoming smoldering, scrap metal heaps.

Name: Static Edge
Description: A modified Proto Sword capable of generating a low-intensity electrical charge.

Name: Super Slime Slasher
Description: A shovel with a wicked edge that's especially well-suited to fighting slimes in the trenches.

Name: Thwack Hammer
Description: A spirited spanner specially suited to scrapping mechanical enemies.

Name: Brandish
Description: A reliable blade whose lack of ornamentation belies its strength.

Name: Calibur
Description: A standard issue sword awarded to Spiral Knights who have proven themselves in the field.

Name: Cutter
Description: A bandit's sword with a vicious row of jagged teeth.

Name: Flourish
Description: A stylish saber well-appointed to foiling your enemies.

Name: Honor Blade
Description: A ceremonial sword issued to Spiral Knight recruits. Though intended for formal occasions, its fine edge makes it suitable for combat use.

Name: Searing Edge
Description: A light blade that sets foes ablaze as it slashes. The technology that keeps the hilt from catching fire is more advanced than the sword itself.

Name: Shocking Edge
Description: A light blade that can deliver a painful shock to its victims. Youthful knights enjoy waving these around on holidays.

Name: Snarble Barb
Description: A bestial blade that can shoot slithy spines at those who would oppose its wielder.

Name: Spur
Description: A mechanized sword with a built in motor that generates energy bursts when used.

Name: Troika
Description: A low-tech sword that makes up for its lack of high internal power with sheer weight and size. It is capable of delivering crushing blows for those that can handle it.

Name: Wrench Wand
Description: A heavy hand tool favored by Gremlins. It's good for both tightening bolts and cracking skulls.

Name: Arc Razor
Description: A finely-crafted mechanical sword that flings sharp bolts of energy outward when swung.

Name: Cautery Sword
Description: A sword adapted from a medical tool, its heated blade reduces tissue damage. It is very formidable at destroying monsters of the slime family.

Name: Fireburst Brandish
Description: An upgraded Brandish infused with the elemental essence of fire.

Name: Flamberge
Description: A fiery foil that burns through as it runs through.

Name: Grintovec
Description: Your enemies will surely enjoy the cool, refreshing sensation of being hit by a glacier.

Name: Tempered Honor Blade
Description: A ceremonial sword issued to seasoned Spiral Knights. Though intended for formal occasions, its fine edge makes it suitable for combat use.

Name: Iceburst Brandish
Description: An upgraded Brandish infused with the elemental essence of ice.

Name: Kamarin
Description: A low-tech sword that's less effective at cutting than it is at crushing your enemies and seeing them driven before you.

Name: Nightblade
Description: A short slicer infused with the essence of the Underworld.

Name: Rigadoon
Description: A stunning saber that will leave your opponent quite off their guard.

Name: Stable Rocket Hammer
Description: Designed by Warmaster Seerus himself, this nefarious gremlin weapon is equipped with a rocket engine that can launch the wielder forward with a powerful hammer smash.  This particular model is a more stable version that blew up gremlin test subjects far fewer times than the prototype.

Name: Sealed Sword
Description: A mysterious sword of great untapped potential. It hums with raw power.

Name: Shockburst Brandish
Description: An upgraded Brandish infused with the elemental essence of lightning.

Name: Striker
Description: A fast sword favored by members of the stealthier branches of the Spiral Order.

Name: Swift Flourish
Description: An upgraded Flourish for knights who make a point of dispatching opponents with a bit of flair.

Name: Tempered Calibur
Description: A Calibur reforged and tempered by the most advanced techniques available to weaponsmiths of the Spiral Order.

Name: Twisted Snarble Barb
Description: A gnarled Snarble Barb enhanced to swing with a satisfying "snicker-snack".

Name: Advanced Cautery Sword
Description: A Cautery Sword with an additional saw function adapted to cutting through the bony spines of larger Lichen Colonies.

Name: Ascended Calibur
Description: Made of a rare alloy of sun silver, knights talented enough to possess Caliburs as fine as this one typically bond with and name their blades.

Name: Avenger
Description: A holy sword created in another time to arm knights who fought against the legions of the Underworld.

Name: Blazebrand
Description: A high-tech blade that fuses Spiral and Clockwork technology. It can produce a concentrated high-temperature explosion that is harmless to knights.

Name: Blizzbrand
Description: A high-tech blade that fuses Spiral and Clockwork technology. It can produce a concentrated low-temperature explosion that is harmless to knights.

Name: Boltbrand
Description: A high-tech blade that fuses Spiral and Clockwork technology. It can produce a powerful electrical discharge that is harmless to knights.

Name: Cold Iron Carver
Description: An enchanted sword crafted from cold iron whose blade wards off the creatures of the dark.

Name: Daring Rigadoon
Description: A savage skewer that will slow even the most salubrious of foes to a crawl.

Name: Dark Thorn Blade
Description: A savage sword whose strength has been fortified by an offering of souls to the beast within.

Name: Faust
Description: A powerful, cursed sword forged in the Underworld. Its powerful charge attacks can sometimes curse the one that wields it.

Name: Fierce Flamberge
Description: A scorching saber whose main thrust is to rotisserie your foes.

Name: Grand Flourish
Description: A fanciful blade for those who prefer to solve their problems with a hop, a skip and a stab.

Name: Ascended Honor Blade
Description: A ceremonial sword issued to Champions of the Spiral Order. Though intended for formal occasions, its fine edge makes it suitable for combat use.

Name: Hunting Blade
Description: A jagged edge used for finishing off big game. It cuts through beasts like butter.

Name: Jalovec
Description: A shivery sword for knights who think it'd be cool to inflict an avalanche of pain upon their foes.

Name: Khorovod
Description: A low-tech, but nonetheless well-made sword whose brutal strikes can stun unsuspecting enemies. Wielding it makes you feel like dancing.

Name: Silent Nightblade
Description: Crafted with some of the most devilish materials found on Cradle, this inky blade can explode with fiendish fury.

Name: Vile Striker
Description: A sneaky saber that stores a payload of poison. Its serrated edge is not meant for cutting bread!

Name: Winmillion
Description: An ornate blade that propels bolts of energy outward with every swing. Inexperienced users have been known to cut themselves when first practicing with it.

Name: Acheron
Description: Striking with the savage power of the Underworld, this dark weapon has been known to drive weak-minded knights to the brink of madness.

Name: Alpha Claw Gauntlet
Description: A protective Wolver-hide gauntlet affixed with razor sharp claws.

Name: Amputator
Description: The culmination of slime family research, the heated reciprocating blades cut through all slimes with surgical precision and prevent their gelatinous bodies from reforming.

Name: Barbarous Thorn Blade
Description: A mythical blade that lashes out with the fury of the Snarbolax itself. Those who wield it claim to feel the fiery stare of the beast upon them whenever they close their eyes.

Name: Caladbolg
Description: A formidable greatsword of lore, its blows cleave the battlefield like a rainbow crosses the sky.

Name: Celestial Saber
Description: A special saber said to resemble Isoran spacefarers of old as they sliced across the night sky. With this equipped, your foes are sure to see stars.

Name: Frozen Great Cleaver
Description: A custom made Triglav designed by Biscotti, head chef of the Skylark. Though she swears it's used just for cooking, one can't help but think more than a few monsters have met it at the chopping block as well.

Name: Mighty Great Cleaver
Description: A custom made Sudaruska designed by Biscotti, head chef of the Skylark. Though she swears it's used just for cooking, one can't help but think more than a few monsters have met it at the chopping block as well.

Name: Cold Iron Vanquisher
Description: A powerful cold iron blade forged for the singular purpose of hunting down and destroying the undead.

Name: Combuster
Description: Combining the principles of the Skylark's engines with the technology powering the Blast Furnace produced this brutal blade, which can ignite even the most flame-retardant materials at a distance.

Name: Deadly Candy Poker
Description: A toothache will be the least of their worries when you're armed with this perforating present.

Name: Divine Avenger
Description: An upgraded Avenger forged from the purest sun steel. There are few foes remaining in this world that are worthy enough to be defeated by such a fine blade, and there are still fewer heroes worthy of wielding it.

Name: Dread Captain Cutlass
Description: A custom curving cutter kept keen on careless castaways.

Name: Dread Venom Striker
Description: An assassin's armament whose edge causes deep wounds that seep with vitriol. You should probably store it separately from your snacks.

Name: Fang of Vog
Description: A sword said to be created from the fang of the fire beast, Vog.

Name: Fearless Rigadoon
Description: The ultimate in paralyzing piercers, it's unclear whether its elegance or its wicked bite is what leaves opponents stupefied.

Name: Final Flourish
Description: The premier armament of the serious fencer, it can riposte just as easily as it can rip up foes.

Name: Firestorm Skeggox
Description: An ornate, fiery axe favored by raiders for its versatility.

Name: Furious Flamberge
Description: Great fencers can carve their name into their opponents. Legendary ones brand it there.

Name: Furious Fork
Description: A good chef knows when to flip burgers. A great chef cooks burgers while they flip them.

Name: Tech Green Furious Fork
Description: A good chef knows when to flip burgers. A great chef cooks burgers while they flip them.

Name: Tech Red Furious Fork
Description: A good chef knows when to flip burgers. A great chef cooks burgers while they flip them.

Name: Glacius
Description: Mixing some advanced theories on cryogenics with the technology powering the Cooling Chamber produced this advanced armament, which is capable of flash-freezing the most formidable of foes.

Name: Gram
Description: An extraordinarily heavy sword whose weight will slow down even the swiftest of knights. That said, just imagine what it'll do to anything you hit with it...

Name: Gran Faust
Description: An upgraded Faust forged from pristine-quality shadow steel. Its charge attacks are powerful enough to curse its wielder, but that hasn't stopped Devilites from treasuring these rare blades even more highly than their meager vacation time.

Name: Lionheart Honor Blade
Description: A ceremonial sword issued to Vanguards of the Spiral Order. Though intended for formal occasions, its fine edge makes it suitable for combat use.

Name: Ice Axe
Description: A technical climbing tool that can pick apart monsters with precision.

Name: Leviathan Blade
Description: A rare treasure of the Spiral Order, the blows from this mythical sword are said to rain down upon its victims like the water from a tidal wave.

Name: Amethyst Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Aquamarine Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Cool Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Citrine Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Wicked Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Dangerous Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Diamond Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Divine Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Emerald Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Garnet Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Military Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Hazardous Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Heavy Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Hunter Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Opal Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Pearl Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Peridot Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Fancy Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Dusky Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Toasty Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Ruby Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Sapphire Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Shadow Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Turquoise Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Volcanic Node Slime Crusher
Description: This calloused carving crusher cascades fury upon fatigued foes.

Name: Obsidian Edge
Description: A sinister sword made from the obsidian obelisks found within the realm of the Apocrea. Simply holding it makes you somehow feel guilty of an unknown crime.

Name: Furious Fork
Description: A good chef knows when to flip burgers. A great chef cooks burgers while they flip them.

Name: Warmaster Rocket Hammer
Description: Designed by Warmaster Seerus himself, this nefarious gremlin weapon is equipped with a rocket engine that can launch the wielder forward with a powerful hammer smash.  This final, perfected design is truly befitting the Grand Arsenal of the great Warmaster Seerus.

Name: Scissor Blades
Description: A custom made Leviathan Blade designed by Bechamel, the Accessorizor.  While these blades are typically used for crafting stylish accoutrements for armor, they are said to be powerful enough to cleave through solid rock.

Name: Squall Caller
Description: An ornate hammer infused with the power of a great storm, it's as cutting-edge as a blunt weapon can be.

Name: Sudaruska
Description: A rugged weapon for the knight who is more than willing to trade style and panache for ridiculous amounts of blunt force trauma.

Name: Sweet Dreams
Description: Don't be fooled by this weapon's fluffy exterior. It hits much harder than it looks. The perfect weapon for fighting things that go bump in the night.

Config: Weapon/Sword/Sweet Dreams, Tech/Sweet Dreams, Tech Azure
Name: Tech Azure Sweet Dreams
Description: Don't be fooled by this weapon's fluffy exterior. It hits much harder than it looks. The perfect weapon for fighting things that go bump in the night.

Config: Weapon/Sword/Sweet Dreams, Tech/Sweet Dreams, Tech Yellow
Name: Tech Yellow Sweet Dreams
Description: Don't be fooled by this weapon's fluffy exterior. It hits much harder than it looks. The perfect weapon for fighting things that go bump in the night.

Name: The Ban Stick
Description: Smite thee with crowbar fury.

Name: Triglav
Description: No stories have been told about this almighty blade, but that's only because people are rarely in the mood to talk after having been crushed by a mountain.

Name: Turbillion
Description: An ostentatious mechanized blade whose turbine crackles with the power of a thousand storms.

Name: Untimely Scythe
Description: An old farmers tool, retired for the season, this blade also excels at reaping your foes.

Name: Shadow Scythe
Description: An old farmers tool, retired for the season, this blade also excels at reaping your foes.

Name: Voltedge
Description: Combining Spiral capacitor technology with samples recovered from the Ironclaw Munitions Factory produced this blade, which can output a particularly hazardous 1.21 gigawatt discharge.

Name: Wild Hunting Blade
Description: A legendary cutter feared by even the mightiest of Wolvers and Chromalisks.

Name: Winter's Edge
Description: A runed sword that will reduce your foe to cold cuts.

Name: Proto Duelist
Description: A six-shot firearm preferred by the marksmen of Spiral Knight recruits.

Name: Proto Gun
Description: A compact firearm issued to all Spiral Knight recruits.

Name: Punch Gun
Description: Used to blast open damaged drop pods, this emergency rescue tool doubles nicely as a powerful, single shot handgun.

Name: Stun Gun
Description: A Proto Gun modified to stun monsters. Stunned monsters move and attack slower than normal.

Name: Chilling Duelist
Description: Start settling disputes at the crack of dawn with this cold, custom handgun.

Name: Frost Gun
Description: A modified Proto Gun augmented with a low intensity, alchemical freezing agent.

Name: Pummel Gun
Description: A Punch Gun properly modified for combat use. The recoil from its powerful charge attack is notorious amongst recruits.

Name: Spitfire
Description: A modified Proto Gun augmented with a low intensity burst of flame.

Name: Super Stun Gun
Description: An upgraded Stun Gun whose powerful blast will discourage even the most disconcerting of Clockworks monsters.

Name: Zapper
Description: A modified Proto Gun augmented with a low intensity electrical charge.

Name: Autogun
Description: A fully automatic handgun capable of rapidly firing powerful bolts of energy.

Name: Blaster
Description: A versatile handgun issued to Spiral Knights who have proven themselves in the field.

Name: Catalyzer
Description: An advanced alchemical armament adapted from Gremlin mining and demolition devices. Catalyzer bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.

Name: Cryotech Alchemer
Description: An alchemical handgun that fires hyper low temperature bullets that split on impact.

Name: Firotech Alchemer
Description: An alchemical handgun that fires bullets of liquid flames that split on impact.

Name: Prismatech Alchemer
Description: An alchemical handgun that fires bullets of photon-charged liquid that split on impact.

Name: Pulsar
Description: A high-tech Gremlin firearm originally designed for use by elite squads of Ironclaw soldiers. Pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Shadowtech Alchemer
Description: An alchemical handgun that fires bullets of concentrated shadow that split on impact.

Name: Voltech Alchemer
Description: An alchemical handgun that fires highly charged ionic bullets that split on impact.

Name: Antigua
Description: A mysterious relic from a forgotten time. It uses explosive powder to fire its rounds.

Name: Cryotech Alchemer Mk II
Description: An upgraded Alchemer that fires bolts of extremely low temperature material at an increased rate.

Name: Dark Chaingun
Description: A machine gun capable of firing a barrage of searing, shadow bolts.

Name: Elemental Blaster
Description: An enhanced blaster modified to fire elemental rounds.

Name: Firotech Alchemer Mk II
Description: An upgraded Alchemer that fires bolts of napalm at an increased rate.

Name: Flaming Pulsar
Description: A pulsar modified with a scorching energy that burns greater over time. Pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Freezing Pulsar
Description: A pulsar modified with a freezing agent that grows colder over time. Pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Heavy Pulsar
Description: A Pulsar upgraded with Spiral technology to pack a greater punch. Pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Industrial Catalyzer
Description: A Catalyzer modified to fire dangerously supercharged projectiles. Catalyzer bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.

Name: Kilowatt Pulsar
Description: A Pulsar upgraded with Spiral technology to deliver an unpleasant shock on impact. Pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Magnus
Description: A large handgun with hard hitting rounds that can leave even the strongest of monsters dazed. A charged shot can even pierce through multiple enemies.

Name: Needle Shot
Description: An Autogun modified to fire piercing bolts at an alarming rate.

Name: Pepperbox
Description: An Autogun modified to fire high-temperature bullets capable of engulfing foes.

Name: Pierce Blaster
Description: An enhanced blaster modified to fire piercing rounds.

Name: Prismatech Alchemer Mk II
Description: An upgraded Alchemer that fires bolts of photonic liquid at an increased rate.

Name: Shadow Blaster
Description: An enhanced blaster modified to fire shadow rounds.

Name: Shadowtech Alchemer Mk II
Description: An upgraded Alchemer that fires bolts of shadow at an increased rate.

Name: Super Blaster
Description: A supercharged Blaster well-suited to longer expeditions down into the Clockworks.

Name: Grim Buster
Description: A handgun alchemized from the shell of a corrupted tortodrone. Shadows seem to seep from the barrel whenever it is brought to bear.

Name: Primal Buster
Description: A handgun alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. While wielding it you can sense the natural energy within waiting to be unleashed.

Name: Stoic Buster
Description: A handgun alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. While wielding it, you sense the quiet passing of the wind and can call upon the rumbling storm that follows.

Name: Wild Buster
Description: A handgun alchemized from a hardened tortodrone shell. While wielding it, you can feel the fierce energies within just waiting to be unleashed.

Name: Toxic Catalyzer
Description: A Catalyzer modified to fire dangerously radioactive projectiles. Catalyzer bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.

Name: Toxic Needle
Description: An Autogun modified to fire piercing bolts dosed with a wicked poison.

Name: Tundrus
Description: A modified magnus that ensures that if somehow your target survived the first shot, they will still be frozen in their tracks. A charged shot can even plow through multiple enemies.

Name: Voltech Alchemer Mk II
Description: An upgraded Alchemer that fires bolts of electricity at an increased rate.

Name: Black Chaingun
Description: A highly advanced machine gun designed to output hundreds of rounds of shadow bolts in a very short time. Controlling one of these requires skilled hands.

Name: Blackhawk
Description: A shadow-aligned handgun of incredible power, it's said to contain the soul of a knight who was only two days from retirement.

Name: Blazing Pulsar
Description: A highly advanced pulsar capable of launching compact infernos from afar. Pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Blight Needle
Description: It's a proven fact that even the most virulent of toxins is a lot more contagious if it's fired indiscriminately over a large area.

Name: Breach Blaster
Description: An enhanced pierce blaster designed to break through hostile armor.

Name: Cryo Driver
Description: A high-tech alchemical sidearm that fires powerful cryo bullets that split multiple times on impact.

Name: Fiery Pepperbox
Description: When you've been attacked by a swarm of Ice Cubes, all Knights agree: happiness is a Fiery Pepperbox.

Name: Firo Driver
Description: A high-tech alchemical sidearm that fires powerful firo bullets that split multiple times on impact.

Name: Frozen Pulsar
Description: A highly advanced pulsar that can produce a blizzard-like blast of ice once its rounds mature. Pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Fusion Blaster
Description: An enhanced elemental blaster designed to banish creatures that lurk in the shadows.

Name: Gigawatt Pulsar
Description: A powerfully enhanced handgun that hits foes with the force of a lightning bolt. Pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Master Blaster
Description: This advanced sidearm is an excellent choice if your adventuring party happens to need another hero.

Name: Mega Magnus
Description: An upgraded Magnus powerful enough to take a monster's head clean off. A charged shot can even pierce through multiple enemies.

Name: Mega Tundrus
Description: An upgraded tundrus that takes no prisoners, except when it does and then the prison is made of ice. A charged shot can even plow through multiple enemies.

Name: Prisma Driver
Description: A high-tech alchemical sidearm that fires powerful prisma bullets that split multiple times on impact.

Name: Radiant Pulsar
Description: A cutting-edge handgun intended for use only by the Spiral Order's best and brightest. Pulsar shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Raptor
Description: An ancient pistol imbued with enchantments designed to smite the fiendish creatures of the Underworld. Like its namesake, its bullets fly fast and strike with deadly force.

Name: Shadow Driver
Description: A high-tech alchemical sidearm that fires powerful shadow bullets that split multiple times on impact.

Name: Silversix
Description: A mysterious antique with a brilliant silver finish, these handguns are said to have been wielded by "gunslinger priests" during a now forgotten time.

Name: Strike Needle
Description: Plans to modify the Strike Needle for non-combat usage were shelved after a recruit accidentally riddled Lieutenant Feron's bunk with holes.

Name: Barrier Cannon
Description: A handgun alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. The elemental offense of a tortodrone on the Long Migration should aid you on your own expeditions.

Name: Feral Cannon
Description: A handgun alchemized from a hardened tortodrone shell. While wielding it, you can feel the penetrating energies within just waiting to be unleashed.

Name: Mighty Cannon
Description: A handgun alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. While wielding it, you can feel the unstable energies within just waiting to be unleashed.

Name: Nether Cannon
Description: A handgun alchemized from the shell of a corrupted tortodrone. A tormented howl of rage can be heard on the wind when it is unleashed upon your foes.

Name: Umbral Blaster
Description: An enhanced shadow blaster designed to neutralize alien bioforms.

Name: Virulent Catalyzer
Description: The incorporation of Spiral technology has given this harrowing handgun a powerfully poisonous payload. Catalyzer bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.

Name: Volatile Catalyzer
Description: Removing the safety overrides from a piece of Gremlin technology is a good way to lose a limb. In this case, it probably won't be one of yours. Catalyzer bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.

Name: Volt Driver
Description: A high-tech alchemical sidearm that fires powerful volt bullets that split multiple times on impact.

Name: Arcana
Description: An exceptional handgun that fires powerful, elemental shots that many Spiral Knights refer to as 'magic missiles.'

Name: Argent Peacemaker
Description: An ancient handgun forged from sun silver. Its bullets serve as ushers for those that refuse to leave this world.

Name: Biohazard
Description: Be sure to check your armor's seals thoroughly before engaging in the operation of this weapon, or you may end up as miserable as your foes. Biohazard bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.

Name: Blitz Needle
Description: For when suppression just isn't good enough, the Blitz Needle specializes in "oppressive fire".

Name: Buccaneer Broadsider
Description: A fearsome firearm fitted with a flintlock. The vintage mechanism's reliability has been enhanced with a bit of gremlin know-how.

Name: Callahan
Description: A handgun of incredible power that can leave its target in a daze. It is said to make its targets feel far less lucky.  A charged shot can even pierce through multiple enemies.

Name: Celestial Orbitgun
Description: This planetoid projecting pistol conjures images of the birth of stellar systems. Opponents caught within its blazing maelstrom are sure to see the light.

Name: Fiery Diskgun
Description: A handgun powered by an infernal engine that launches molten disks in rapid succession. Diskgun shots return once reaching their apogee.

Name: Gilded Griffin
Description: A beautiful pistol named after a great, noble beast. Its golden frame was believed to provide light within the impenetrable darkness of the Underworld.

Name: Grim Repeater
Description: Used only by the most elite of the Spiral Knight rangers, this devilish machine gun earned its name from the incredible speed in which it hands out shadowy tickets to the afterlife.

Name: Hail Driver
Description: Once you've seen the splitting bolts of unnaturally cold ice it produces, you'll understand why this Driver is hailed.

Name: Iron Slug
Description: Only the most frightening of foes can withstand the crippling paralysis caused by the magnum force of the Iron Slug's sudden impact. A charged shot can even pierce through multiple enemies.

Name: Magma Driver
Description: Spitting gobs of molten death at an alarming rate, this sublime sidearm is not recommended for use around (or on) anyone (or anything) that you happen to care deeply about.

Name: Neutralizer
Description: You'd be surprised at the number of practical applications to be had from two substances that, when combined, leave quite literally nothing in their wake. Neutralizer bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.

Name: Nog Blaster
Description: One highly volatile chamber full of creamy, high-cholesterol cheer that when fired really packs a punch.

Name: Nova Driver
Description: It'll take more than a wish to save you if you're the unfortunate target of this all-powerful pistol with the strength of the stars themselves.

Name: Obsidian Carbine
Description: A deadly gun made from the obsidian obelisks found within the realm of the Apocrea. With every shot fired, a faint whisper is heard, believed to be the true name of its target.

Name: Overcharged Mixmaster
Description: An industrial strength handheld mixer that is sure to stir things up.

Name: Cool Owlite Wand
Description: They say the wand chooses the wizard, so don't let this one see your cute friend.

Name: Divine Owlite Wand
Description: They say the wand chooses the wizard, so don't let this one see your cute friend.

Name: Regal Owlite Wand
Description: They say the wand chooses the wizard, so don't let this one see your cute friend.

Name: Military Owlite Wand
Description: They say the wand chooses the wizard, so don't let this one see your cute friend.

Name: Heavy Owlite Wand
Description: They say the wand chooses the wizard, so don't let this one see your cute friend.

Name: Fancy Owlite Wand
Description: They say the wand chooses the wizard, so don't let this one see your cute friend.

Name: Dusky Owlite Wand
Description: They say the wand chooses the wizard, so don't let this one see your cute friend.

Name: Toasty Owlite Wand
Description: They say the wand chooses the wizard, so don't let this one see your cute friend.

Name: Shadow Owlite Wand
Description: They say the wand chooses the wizard, so don't let this one see your cute friend.

Name: Volcanic Owlite Wand
Description: They say the wand chooses the wizard, so don't let this one see your cute friend.

Name: Spiral Soaker
Description: A deadly squirt gun sure to soak even the driest of foes.

Name: Peppermint Repeater
Description: This holiday hand cannon is the proper piece to pepper your opponents with hot lead of holiday cheer.

Name: Permafroster
Description: Tech Knights are not yet sure if targets of this deep-freezing handgun ever actually defrost. So far, 'no.' Permafroster shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Phantamos
Description: A powerful handgun brimming with dark energy. The Phantamos represents one of the most recent additions to the Spiral Knight's arsenal, as containing shadow energy of this degree took a great deal of research.

Name: Plague Needle
Description: Knights are divided on whether this gun's bolts pierce and then poison, or poison and then pierce. To the unlucky target, this distinction is irrelevant.

Name: Polaris
Description: It's said that the explosions caused by this stellar sidearm are so bright that you'll always be able to find your way in the darkness. Polaris shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Pollinator
Description: A rare, advanced handgun produced by biotechs with captured Gremlin technology. It fires pollen particles that cling to the enemy, causing explosive damage and also the sniffles.

Name: Riftlocker
Description: A deadly handgun said to be capable of sundering heavy armor with a single shot. These firearms proved instrumental during the siege of Isora in breaking through the war machines of the Morai.

Name: Sentenza
Description: An ancient handgun forged from shadow steel. It is said to have been wielded by an evil one who possessed "angel eyes."

Name: Spiral Soaker
Description: A deadly squirt gun sure to soak even the driest of foes.

Name: Tech Blue Spiral Soaker
Description: A deadly squirt gun sure to soak even the driest of foes.

Name: Tech Violet Spiral Soaker
Description: A deadly squirt gun sure to soak even the driest of foes.

Name: Static Diskgun
Description: A shockingly powerful handgun that creates a storm of electrified disks. Diskgun shots return once reaching their apogee.

Name: Storm Driver
Description: The latent charge running through this supreme sidearm is strong enough to cause discomfort to anyone wielding it, and extreme discomfort to anyone shot by it.

Name: Supernova
Description: The destruction left in the wake of this peerless pistol is anything but nebulous. Supernova shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Gorgofist
Description: A terrifying handgun that combines the dual-crushing power of a gorgo and the mythical tortomega. Suppressing enemies has never been more fiendishly fun.

Name: Grand Tortofist
Description: A handgun empowered by the limitless fury of a tortodrone. While wielding it you can feel the berserk energy within eager to be unleashed.

Name: Omega Tortofist
Description: A handgun empowered by the limitless fury of a tortodrone. While wielding it you are capable of unleashing the energy of a legion of tortodrones upon your foes.

Name: Savage Tortofist
Description: A handgun alchemized from a hardened tortodrone shell. While wielding it you can feel the primal energy of a rampaging wolver pack within waiting to be unleashed.

Name: Umbra Driver
Description: This horrifyingly powerful handgun fires bullets that are completely devoid of color, odor and mercy.

Name: Valiance
Description: This high-performance handgun is a symbol of the Spiral Order, and is proudly worn by veteran members. As it is often said, a knight need not have courage: just Valiance.

Name: Valiance
Description: This high-performance handgun is a symbol of the Spiral Order, and is proudly worn by veteran members. As it is often said, a knight need not have courage: just Valiance.

Name: Volcanic Pepperbox
Description: When encamped in dangerous territory, the Volcanic Pepperbox is perfect for roasting both marshmallows and enemies.

Name: Wildfire
Description: An elite handgun that can offer a tremendous surprise for the enemy on the battlefield as its small charges of energy transform into raging wildfires. Wildfire shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Winter Grave
Description: A tremendously powerful hand cannon whose moniker should come as no surprise to anyone who happens to be viewing it from the wrong end. A charged shot can even plow through multiple enemies.

Name: Cool Wanderer's Wand
Description: Wonderful for waving.

Name: Divine Wanderer's Wand
Description: Wonderful for waving.

Name: Dusky Wanderer's Wand
Description: Wonderful for waving.

Name: Fancy Wanderer's Wand
Description: Wonderful for waving.

Name: Heavy Wanderer's Wand
Description: Wonderful for waving.

Name: Military Wanderer's Wand
Description: Wonderful for waving.

Name: Prismatic Wanderer's Wand
Description: Wonderful for waving.

Name: Regal Wanderer's Wand
Description: Wonderful for waving.

Name: Shadow Wanderer's Wand
Description: Wonderful for waving.

Name: Toasty Wanderer's Wand
Description: Wonderful for waving.

Name: Volcanic Wanderer's Wand
Description: Wonderful for waving.

Name: Proto Bomb
Description: A small bomb used by Spiral Knight recruits to learn the art of blowing things up.

Name: Cold Snap
Description: A Proto Bomb modified to generate small bursts of frost upon detonation.

Name: Firecracker
Description: A Proto Bomb modified to generate small bursts of fire upon detonation.

Name: Static Flash
Description: A Proto Bomb modified to generate small bursts of electricity upon detonation.

Name: Blast Bomb
Description: An all-purpose bomb issued to Spiral Knights who have proven themselves in the field.

Name: Crystal Bomb
Description: A shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in an alloy of Moonstone and Valestone. Its soothing shade of cerulean has been clinically proven to both calm knights and annihilate the undead.

Name: Dark Matter Bomb
Description: A shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in Dark Matter. Since its original discovery, Dark Matter has been put to a variety of uses, from powering Spiral technology, to rearranging Gremlins on a subatomic level.

Name: Fiery Vaporizer
Description: An alchemical bomb that creates a cloud of highly combustible mist.

Name: Freezing Vaporizer
Description: An alchemical bomb that produces a cloud of ultra-low temperature mist.

Name: Haze Bomb
Description: An alchemical bomb that creates a noxious cloud capable of stunning those caught inside.

Name: Shard Bomb
Description: A shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in depleted Crimsonite. Depleted or not, this sucker can sling some serious shrapnel.

Name: Slumber Smogger
Description: An alchemical bomb that fogs an area with a sleep agent.

Name: Spine Cone
Description: A ferocious device that is positively bursting with briars.

Name: Splinter Bomb
Description: A shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in a synthetic mineral. Prone to shattering, the otherwise useless material in this bomb is perfect for giving foes a nasty splinter.

Name: Static Capacitor
Description: An explosive device of Gremlin origin designed to produce a deadly field of electricity.

Name: Toxic Vaporizer
Description: An alchemical bomb that produces a noxious cloud of toxins.

Name: Dark Reprisal
Description: A potent bomb brimming with dark energy that Warmaster Seerus engineered with the sole purpose of eliminating other gremlins that stood in his way.

Name: Deconstructor
Description: A bomb specially designed for dismantling machinery, sentient or otherwise.

Name: Electron Charge
Description: A small electro-explosive charge with mysterious origins. It is capable of generating a crippling vortex of electricity.

Name: Fiery Vaporizer Mk II
Description: A Fiery Vaporizer modified to disperse combustible material over a wider range.

Name: Freezing Vaporizer Mk II
Description: A Freezing Vaporizer modified to disperse ultra low-temperature chemicals over a wider range.

Name: Graviton Charge
Description: A small explosive charge with mysterious origins. It is capable of generating a vortex of crushing gravity.

Name: Haze Bomb Mk II
Description: A Haze Bomb modified to disperse noxious chemicals over a wider range.

Name: Lightning Capacitor
Description: An upgraded Capacitor that can explode with the fury of an electrical storm.

Name: Rock Salt Bomb
Description: A shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in rock salt. Not recommended for use in the kitchen.

Name: Slumber Smogger Mk II
Description: A Slumber Smogger modified to disperse sleepy smog over a wider range.

Name: Sun Shards
Description: A shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in solar-charged Luminite. Whatever you do, don't look directly at it.

Name: Super Blast Bomb
Description: An upgraded Blast Bomb that combines an unstable heat source with untested explosive material to make one seriously unsafe package.

Name: Super Crystal Bomb
Description: A shard bomb stuffed with even more alloy. Apply directly to your foe's head.

Name: Super Dark Matter Bomb
Description: A shard bomb stuffed with even more Dark Matter. How much Dark Matter is too much? This much.

Name: Super Shard Bomb
Description: A shard bomb stuffed with even more depleted Crimsonite. The choicest cure for a combative creature is clearly a crystal to the cranium.

Name: Super Splinter Bomb
Description: A shard bomb stuffed with even more synthetic mineral. It can also be used to mince vegetables, if you don't mind picking the occasional crystal out of your teeth.

Name: Toxic Vaporizer Mk II
Description: A Toxic Vaporizer modified to disperse noxious agents over a wider range.

Name: Twisted Spine Cone
Description: An enhanced Spine Cone that will thrash opponents with thorns and bury them in brambles.

Name: Dark Reprisal Mk II
Description: A refined version of the shadowy bomb that Warmaster Seerus engineered with the sole purpose of eliminating other gremlins that stood in his way.

Name: Electron Bomb
Description: Adapted from several unconventional Gremlin theories on physics, anyone unlucky enough to be dragged into this bomb's blast is in for a shock.

Name: Fiery Atomizer
Description: A powerful alchemical bomb that creates a dense cloud of highly combustible, searing dust.

Name: Freezing Atomizer
Description: A powerful alchemical bomb that produces a dense cloud of extremely frigid mist.

Name: Graviton Bomb
Description: Capable of dragging enemies toward its location before exploding, this bomb utilizes technology that the Spiral Order does not fully understand.

Name: Haze Burst
Description: A powerful alchemical bomb that produces a dense cloud of intensely disorienting material.

Name: Heavy Crystal Bomb
Description: A solid chunk of alloy with an explosive surprise inside. Zombies hate surprises.

Name: Heavy Dark Matter Bomb
Description: A solid chunk of Dark Matter with an explosive surprise inside. Gremlins hate surprises.

Name: Heavy Deconstructor
Description: An upgraded Deconstructor that will wreck robots and crush constructs in a wider area.

Name: Heavy Shard Bomb
Description: A solid chunk of depleted Crimsonite with an explosive surprise inside. Everybody loves surprises!

Name: Heavy Splinter Bomb
Description: A solid chunk of synthetic mineral with an explosive surprise inside. Wolvers hate surprises.

Name: Ionized Salt Bomb
Description: A solid chunk of rock salt with an explosive surprise inside. Jellies hate surprises.

Name: Irontech Bomb
Description: A heavy bomb wrapped in thick iron plates. Though it is slower than most bombs, it packs a powerful punch.

Name: Master Blast Bomb
Description: An incredibly powerful explosive typically used in mining, now issued somewhat recklessly for use in combat.

Name: Plasma Capacitor
Description: The addition of an advanced Spiral power source gives this bomb a shockingly large blast radius.

Name: Radiant Sun Shards
Description: A solid chunk of solar-charged Luminite with an explosive surprise inside. Devilites hate surprises.

Name: Slumber Squall
Description: A powerful alchemical bomb that creates a thick fog of sleepy mist.

Name: Spike Shower
Description: A powerful device designed to shred opponents with a snarl.

Name: Toxic Atomizer
Description: A powerful alchemical bomb that produces a choking poisonous cloud.

Name: Ash of Agni
Description: When this bomb has left the battlefield in ashes, then, and only then, will your enemies have permission to die.

Name: Big Angry Bomb
Description: An immensely powerful bomb with a terrible attitude.

Name: Celestial Vortex
Description: A Celestial Bomb modified with a payload of a dying sun. Foes caught in its fiery blast radius are shown a glimpse of the dawn of creation.

Name: Dark Briar Barrage
Description: A mythical object that can explode with the fury of the Snarbolax itself. The unearthly howl it produces is said to be more crippling than its blast.

Name: Deadly Charcoaler
Description: This gallant grill is guaranteed to char your competition.

Name: Tech Pink Deadly Charcoaler
Description: This gallant grill is guaranteed to char your competition.

Name: Tech Yellow Deadly Charcoaler
Description: This gallant grill is guaranteed to char your competition.

Name: Deadly Crystal Bomb
Description: A large chunk of Moonstone and Valestone alloy primed with a potent explosive. Studies have shown that this bomb can be used to reduce a zombie's craving for brains by up to 100% by blowing them to pieces.

Name: Deadly Dark Matter Bomb
Description: A large chunk of Dark Matter primed with a potent explosive. This bomb would be in stark violation of the Spiral Order's safety handbook if they hadn't lost the last copy in the crash.

Name: Deadly Shard Bomb
Description: A large chunk of Crimsonite primed with a potent explosive. No more depleted Crimsonite here: this bomb's made with the good stuff! Or the bad stuff, if you happen to be the target.

Name: Deadly Splinter Bomb
Description: A large chunk of synthetic mineral primed with a potent explosive. Fact: the easiest way to find the splinter in the haystack is to blow up the haystack.

Name: Electron Vortex
Description: An Electron Bomb modified with a payload of unstable organic essence. Foes caught in its punishing blast radius are cruelly referred to as "thunderstuck".

Name: Graviton Vortex
Description: A Graviton Bomb fortified with potentially dangerous amounts of shadow steel. Its blast should draw your foes toward it... if it doesn't rip the entire universe in two, that is.

Name: Humbug Hazer
Description: This cantankerous contraption is guaranteed to make anyone but the most curmudgeonly humbug sick to their stomach.

Name: Irontech Destroyer
Description: The big brother of the Irontech Bomb, the Destroyer unleashes the full potential of irontech power.

Name: Jack Froster
Description: Usher in a winter wonderland with this nose-nipping, nasty surprise that is perfect for giving your foes a bad case of frostbite.

Name: Nitronome
Description: An advanced explosive issued to only the most elite Spiral Knight grenadiers. It's made from a synthetic substance that ticks ominously even when unarmed.

Name: Obsidian Crusher
Description: A peculiar bomb made from the obsidian obelisks found within the realm of the Apocrea. Despite it being a bomb, some are drawn to holding it and 'solving' it as if it were some kind of puzzle.

Name: Deadly Charcoaler
Description: This gallant grill is guaranteed to char your competition.

Name: Piggy Banker
Description: A small volatile bank that is sure to burn a hole in your enemies' pockets.

Name: Pot O' Crowns
Description: An unlucky thing for your foes to find, it explodes in a painful blow.

Name: Powder Keg
Description: Careful, this thing could go off like a metaphorical powder keg.

Name: Punkin Cinnamug
Description: A frothy blend of punkins and cinnamon that is sure to burn those that don't wait for this mug to cool.

Name: Scalding Hot Cocoa
Description: A singeing splash of sweet destruction awaits any foe that goes for this mug before it's had a chance to cool.

Name: Scintillating Sun Shards
Description: A large chunk of solar-charged Luminite primed with a potent explosive. The pyrotechnic show upon detonation is positively stunning.

Name: Shivermist Buster
Description: Originally used to flash freeze perishable supplies, the Shivermist Buster is far more satisfying when used to flash freeze monsters in their tracks.

Name: Shocking Salt Bomb
Description: A large chunk of rock salt primed with a potent explosive. For nutritional purposes, this particular chunk of salt has been enriched with dangerous amounts of electricity. Wait, what?

Name: Sloppy Shard Bomb
Description: An unreliable, but powerful Gremlin explosive.

Name: Stagger Storm
Description: Though it was originally developed by the Spiral Order to harmlessly subdue dangerous species, how you deal with foes unfortunate enough to be caught in the storm is entirely up to you.

Name: Torpor Tantrum
Description: The ultimate sleep bomb. It's like a bedtime story, only more explodey.

Name: Venom Veiler
Description: The ultimate in toxic dispersal devices, the Venom Veiler can be used to destroy pests on crops. Failing that, it can also be used to destroy crops.

Name: Virulent Seedling
Description: This small, dangerous plant has been weaponized by biotechs so that it spreads a cloud of toxic spores on detonation. Don't let the size fool you, it packs several kiloaudreys of power.

Name: Voltaic Tempest
Description: This high-tech, high voltage device is not recommended for use in water, around water, or near people thinking about water. To be safe, you probably shouldn't look at it, either.

Name: Dark Retribution
Description: The perfected version of the shadowy bomb that Warmaster Seerus engineered with the sole purpose of eliminating other gremlins that stood in his way.  It is thought to have been reserved for use against other members of the Crimson Order.

Name: GM Helmet, Bucket
Description: An impressive indigo helmet that's the indisputable indication of one of the Spiral Order's incredible Game Masters.

Name: GM Helmet, Nose
Description: An impressive indigo helmet that's the indisputable indication of one of the Spiral Order's incredible Game Masters.

Name: GM Helmet, Nose (Open)
Description: An impressive indigo helmet that's the indisputable indication of one of the Spiral Order's incredible Game Masters.

Name: GM Helmet, Pith
Description: An impressive indigo helmet that's the indisputable indication of one of the Spiral Order's incredible Game Masters.

Name: GM Helmet, Plumed
Description: An impressive indigo helmet that's the indisputable indication of one of the Spiral Order's incredible Game Masters.

Name: GM Helmet, Winged
Description: An impressive indigo helmet that's the indisputable indication of one of the Spiral Order's incredible Game Masters.

Name: Cyclops Cap
Description: A strange helm with a single, focused eye favored by junior gunners.

Name: Groundbreaker Helm
Description: A sturdy helm worn by knights who were among the first to brave the depths of the Clockworks.

Name: Mining Hat
Description: A sturdy, old helmet once used to dig for precious minerals. It offers a little more defense than a Spiral Helm.

Description: A light helmet issued to all Spiral Knight recruits.

Name: Circuit Breaker Helm
Description: A Spiral Helm modified to provide additional protection against shock, at the expense of fire and freeze resistance.

Name: Emberbreak Helm
Description: A Spiral Helm modified to provide additional protection against fire, at the expense of freeze and shock resistance.

Name: Frostbreaker Helm
Description: A Spiral Helm modified to provide additional protection against freeze, at the expense of fire and shock resistance.

Name: Ignition Helm
Description: A lightweight helmet augmented to keep a knight's head cool under pressure.

Name: Padded Cap
Description: A one size fits all light helm that is typically worn by gunslingers.

Name: Spiral Scale Helm
Description: A light mail helm that slightly shields oneself from piercing strikes.

Name: Tri-Guard Helm
Description: A special helmet designed specifically for knights on first recon of alien planets. This rugged helmet protects against a variety of harsh elements.

Name: Fractured Mask of Seerus
Description: A remake of a mask once worn by Warmaster Seerus of the Crimson Order.  Made from fractured mask fragments, it only somewhat resembles the original.

Name: Cobalt Helm
Description: A high-performance helmet of the Spiral Order suitable for any adventure.

Name: Firebreak Helm
Description: An Emberbreak Helm modified to provide further protection against fire.

Name: Icebreaker Helm
Description: A Frostbreaker Helm modified to provide further protection against freeze.

Name: Jelly Helm
Description: Gelatinous headgear made from gooey guardians.

Name: Magic Hood
Description: An enchanting hood for knights who dabble in divination and contemplate conjuring.

Name: Pathfinder Helm
Description: A helm handy for blazing trails and protecting against the bites of hungry monsters in the wild.

Name: Sentinel Helm
Description: A helm imbued with the power to repel the various afflictions that knights might encounter in the line of duty.

Name: Shade Helm
Description: A dark matter infused helm that allows its wearer to get the drop on foes by shooting straight from the shadows.

Name: Skelly Mask
Description: A spooky mask good for both scaring children and protecting from shadow attacks.

Name: Spiral Demo Helm
Description: A sturdy helm designed for use by explosively-inclined knights.

Name: Spiral Plate Helm
Description: A heavyweight helm made of iron designed to withstand stunning impacts.

Name: Volt Breaker Helm
Description: A Circuit Breaker Helm modified to provide further protection against shock.

Name: Wolver Cap
Description: A lively hat made from significantly less lively Wolver hide.

Name: Angelic Helm
Description: A beautiful helm made to resemble a heavenly guardian.

Name: Black Kat Hood
Description: A crudely hewn hood made to resemble a shadowy sapper of the ill-fated Kat Tribe.

Name: Blazebreak Helm
Description: A reliable helmet that'll come in handy when the heat is on.

Name: Blizzbreaker Helm
Description: A reliable helmet that'll keep you from freezing up in tense situations.

Name: Boosted Plate Helm
Description: A Spiral Plate Helm with a supercharged internal power source. It's a little hard to see out of.

Name: Brute Jelly Helm
Description: A hardy helm crafted from overly oppressive ooze.

Name: Chroma Mask
Description: A mask crafted from the hide of a chromalisk, offering the wearer its distinguished look.

Name: Drake Scale Helm
Description: A helmet crafted from the scales of beasts thought to be the descendants of dragons.

Name: Dusker Cap
Description: A hide helm for knights that prefer to take their opponents on toe-to-toe.

Name: Elemental Hood
Description: A mystical mask for sorcerous scrappers that provides significant shielding from the elements.

Name: Feral Kat Hood
Description: A primitive looking hood made to resemble a wild beast.

Name: Fused Demo Helm
Description: An upgraded Demo Helm fused dangerously with the unstable core from a powerful Blast Cube. It produces an unpleasant hum in your ears.

Name: Gunslinger Hat
Description: A mighty fine piece of headgear worn by pistol-packing warriors from a forgotten time. It's perfect for dueling, searching or drifting across high plains.

Name: Kat Claw Hood
Description: A crudely hewn hood made to resemble a cut-throat warrior of the ill-fated Kat Tribe.

Name: Kat Eye Hood
Description: A crudely hewn hood made to resemble a crack shot warrior of the ill-fated Kat Tribe.

Name: Kat Hiss Hood
Description: A crudely hewn hood made to resemble a temperamental warrior of the ill-fated Kat Tribe.

Name: m.magikat_hat
Description: f.magikat_hat

Name: Padded Demo Helm
Description: An upgraded helm for bombers that is lined with soft, stimulating padding.

Name: Padded Hunting Cap
Description: An upgraded helm for hunters that is lined with soft, stimulating padding.

Name: Woven Falcon Pathfinder Helm
Description: A flexible helm built for mobility and interlaced with slime fibers to protect against prickly and thorny foes.

Name: Woven Firefly Pathfinder Helm
Description: A flexible helm built for mobility and interlaced with slime fibers to protect against prickly and thorny foes.

Name: Woven Grizzly Pathfinder Helm
Description: A flexible helm built for mobility and interlaced with slime fibers to protect against prickly and thorny foes.

Name: Woven Snakebite Pathfinder Helm
Description: A flexible helm built for mobility and interlaced with slime fibers to protect against prickly and thorny foes.

Name: Quicksilver Helm
Description: A fine helmet made out of what was once a Quicksilver.

Name: Scary Skelly Mask
Description: An upgraded Skelly Mask infused with the elemental essence of fear. Wearing it makes the hair on the back of your neck stand up.

Name: Woven Falcon Sentinel Helm
Description: A helm imbued with interwoven wolver hair to protect against even the harshest elements.

Name: Woven Firefly Sentinel Helm

Description: A suit of fiendish fabric interlaced with dark matter to conceal its wearer while they creep in camoflauged corners.

Name: Plated Firefly Shade Armor
Description: A suit of fiendish fabric interlaced with dark matter to conceal its wearer while they creep in camoflauged corners.

Name: Plated Grizzly Shade Armor
Description: A suit of fiendish fabric interlaced with dark matter to conceal its wearer while they creep in camoflauged corners.

Name: Plated Snakebite Shade Armor
Description: A suit of fiendish fabric interlaced with dark matter to conceal its wearer while they creep in camoflauged corners.

Name: Silvermail
Description: Strong, yet light armor for knights who've sworn an oath to hunt down and destroy the undead, wherever it may lurk.

Name: Sinister Skelly Suit
Description: A bony barrier that throbs with malevolence. Anyone skeptical of this suit's power deserves a good ribbing.

Name: Sunset Duster
Description: A sturdy set of leather clothing made for a pilgrim with true grit.

Name: Virulisk Suit
Description: A thick set of gear crafted from the carcass of a Virulisk. Wearers will inherit some of the Virulisk's poison resistance, as well as its taste for flan.

Name: Vitasuit Deluxe
Description: Four out of five Spiral medics recommend this armor for everyday use. The fifth was crushed by a Tortodrone.

Name: Wyvern Scale Mail
Description: It requires extreme temperatures to forge this fine armor made from the scales of rare Clockworks beasts.

Name: Almirian Crusader Armor
Description: Armor once worn by the elite royal guard of the kingdom of Almire. Its ivory color was a symbol of Almire's purity, both in the land and in the hearts of its people.

Name: Ancient Plate Mail
Description: A suit of artifact armor that is said to have been worn by titans. Though it offers amazing protection, its incredible weight makes it cumbersome to wear.

Name: Arcane Salamander Suit
Description: A Salamander Suit imbued with magical power.  It is thought to be made from the familiars of powerful witches.

Name: Armor of the Fallen
Description: A cursed suit of armor once worn by a celestial being cast down from paradise.

Name: Azure Guardian Armor
Description: A grand set of armor commonly donned by the leaders of the Spiral Order. It's extraordinarily thick and protective, but as comfortable to wear as flowing miracloth.

Name: Black Kat Raiment
Description: A reclaimed raiment that is brimming with dark energy. It is said to resemble the great Kat Tribe hero, Margrel, the one who opened The Book of Grey Feathers and brought about the Kataclysm. It brings great misfortune to anyone who dares to wear it.

Name: Bombastic Demo Suit
Description: A fine set of armor specially forged for those select few individuals who can handle explosives with panache and flair... while managing to avoid blowing themselves up.

Name: Chaos Cloak
Description: A forbidden mantle said to grant the wearer protection within the nameless realm where all elements are said to converge into one and divide into all.

Name: Deadly Virulisk Suit
Description: A fine suit made out of hide from the deadliest of Virulisks. Sadly, it doesn't appear to have retained any of the Virulisk's ability to camouflage.

Name: Deadshot Mantle
Description: A poncho for a pale rider with sights set on taking down the bad, ugly, undead denizens of the dark.

Name: Deep Sea Cuirass
Description: A suit of armor with iridescent scales that seem to move like shimmering waves. The armor is rather uncomfortable to wear as it is naturally cold and wet at all times.

Name: Divine Mantle
Description: A heavenly cloak thought to be once worn by celestial sages.

Name: Dragon Scale Mail
Description: Mythical armor crafted from the scales of a creature of legend.

Name: Dread Skelly Suit
Description: The most fearsome Skelly Suit known to exist. There is nothing humerus about these dreadful duds.

Name: Grey Feather Mantle
Description: A cloak for renowned Owlite scholars, this feathery frock is filled with the wisdom of the ages... and is super soft!

Name: Heavenly Iron Armor
Description: A powerful suit of armor said to be crafted from angelic shields.  It retains many divine properties celestial beings possess but lacks their weakness to fire.

Name: Ice Queen Mail
Description: A regal suit of armor resembling the ever-frigid Ice Queen.  In addition to providing great defense, it is said to dramatically boost one's ego and create a cold detachment from those around them.

Name: Ironmight Plate Mail
Description: Superior plate mail forged from an alloy of several rare metals. It's restrictive, but incredibly strong.

Name: Justifier Jacket
Description: A finely-made suit for danger-seeking gunslingers who would much rather be quick than dead.

Name: Kat Claw Raiment
Description: A reclaimed raiment said to resemble the Kat Tribe hero, Scraith, first to scale the walls of the Owlite High Academy of Magicks.

Name: Kat Eye Raiment
Description: A reclaimed raiment said to resemble the Kat Tribe hero, Preowa, whose artillery silenced the Grey Feather Tower Sages.

Name: Kat Hiss Raiment
Description: A reclaimed raiment said to resemble the Kat Tribe hero, Torair, who clung to the gates of the Owlite High Academy of Magicks as both it and his explosives burned.

Name: Mad Bomber Suit
Description: Some people have axes to grind. Others have points to make. This armor is for those of us with explosive tempers.

Name: Mercurial Demo Suit
Description: A demo suit made from gremlin technology. It is for the bomber that wants a boost of speed, more power and a greatly reduced chance of dying by electrocution... which is probably every bomber out there.

Name: Mercurial Mail
Description: A supreme set of silver armor that'll put a spring in your step while keeping shocks out of it.

Name: Nameless Poncho
Description: A nameless poncho worn by a nameless hero of legend.

Name: Sacred Falcon Guerrilla Armor
Description: A sturdy suit of armor for those who want to bring down some beasts.

Name: Sacred Firefly Guerrilla Armor
Description: A sturdy suit of armor for those who want to bring down some beasts.

Name: Sacred Grizzly Guerrilla Armor
Description: A sturdy suit of armor for those who want to bring down some beasts.

Name: Sacred Snakebite Guerrilla Armor
Description: A sturdy suit of armor for those who want to bring down some beasts.

Name: Sacred Falcon Hazard Armor
Description: A sturdy suit of armor for those who want to shoot some slimes.

Name: Sacred Firefly Hazard Armor
Description: A sturdy suit of armor for those who want to shoot some slimes.

Name: Sacred Grizzly Hazard Armor
Description: A sturdy suit of armor for those who want to shoot some slimes.

Name: Sacred Snakebite Hazard Armor
Description: A sturdy suit of armor for those who want to shoot some slimes.

Name: Sacred Falcon Pathfinder Armor
Description: A reinforced suit of double padded armor that is sure to stop the sharpest of foes.

Name: Sacred Firefly Pathfinder Armor
