Name: Radiant Silvermail
Description: An upgraded set of Silvermail that is said to shine brightly even in the darkest of hours.

Name: Royal Jelly Mail
Description: A viciously viscous set of armor crafted painstakingly from the most noble specimens of quivering slime.

Name: Sacred Falcon Keeper Armor
Description: A cerulean suit of armor for those who want to wreck some robos.

Name: Sacred Firefly Keeper Armor
Description: A cerulean suit of armor for those who want to wreck some robos.

Name: Sacred Grizzly Keeper Armor
Description: A cerulean suit of armor for those who want to wreck some robos.

Name: Sacred Snakebite Keeper Armor
Description: A cerulean suit of armor for those who want to wreck some robos.

Name: Sacred Falcon Sentinel Armor
Description: A raidiant defending doubleweave for insulating against erratic elements.

Name: Sacred Firefly Sentinel Armor
Description: A raidiant defending doubleweave for insulating against erratic elements.

Name: Sacred Grizzly Sentinel Armor
Description: A raidiant defending doubleweave for insulating against erratic elements.

Name: Sacred Snakebite Sentinel Armor
Description: A raidiant defending doubleweave for insulating against erratic elements.

Name: Sacred Falcon Wraith Armor
Description: A stalwart suit of armor for those who are gunning for gremlins.

Name: Sacred Firefly Wraith Armor
Description: A stalwart suit of armor for those who are gunning for gremlins.

Name: Sacred Grizzly Wraith Armor
Description: A stalwart suit of armor for those who are gunning for gremlins.

Name: Sacred Snakebite Wraith Armor
Description: A stalwart suit of armor for those who are gunning for gremlins.

Name: Sacred Falcon Ghost Armor
Description: A spectral suit of armor for those who are gunning for ghosts.

Name: Sacred Firefly Ghost Armor
Description: A spectral suit of armor for those who are gunning for ghosts.

Name: Sacred Grizzly Ghost Armor
Description: A spectral suit of armor for those who are gunning for ghosts.

Name: Sacred Snakebite Ghost Armor
Description: A spectral suit of armor for those who are gunning for ghosts.

Name: Sacred Falcon Hex Armor
Description: A phantasmal suit of armor for those who are aiming for the infernal.

Name: Sacred Firefly Hex Armor
Description: A phantasmal suit of armor for those who are aiming for the infernal.

Name: Sacred Grizzly Hex Armor
Description: A phantasmal suit of armor for those who are aiming for the infernal.

Name: Sacred Snakebite Hex Armor
Description: A phantasmal suit of armor for those who are aiming for the infernal.

Name: Sacred Falcon Shade Armor
Description: A shadowy suit of armor built to outlast whatever might slink from the shadows.

Name: Sacred Firefly Shade Armor
Description: A shadowy suit of armor built to outlast whatever might slink from the shadows.

Name: Sacred Grizzly Shade Armor
Description: A shadowy suit of armor built to outlast whatever might slink from the shadows.

Name: Sacred Snakebite Shade Armor
Description: A shadowy suit of armor built to outlast whatever might slink from the shadows.

Name: Shadowsun Slicker
Description: An evil duster that is said to harbor a great power that feeds off of the unforgiven sins of its owners.

Name: Skolver Coat
Description: The ultimate in Wolver-hide clothing, this coat has been expertly crafted to give your melee attacks extra power.

Name: Snarbolax Coat
Description: A shadowy suit made from the hide of a sinister Snarbolax.  Even looking at it too closely is dangerous.

Name: Starlit Demo Suit
Description: An advanced demolitions suit capable of resisting the strongest sleep mists. The soft glow is strangely stimulating.

Name: Starlit Hunting Coat
Description: An advanced, star-soaked hunting coat that will keep you awake even as it coddles you in downy comfort.

Name: Valkyrie Mail
Description: A priceless set of armor whose name denizens of the Underworld dare not mention.

Name: Vog Cub Coat
Description: This hide garment is so flame retardant that you won't even mind that it reeks of wood smoke.

Name: Volcanic Demo Suit
Description: Highly protective gear for the cutting-edge demolition man. The internal cooling system makes you feel a little like you've been cryogenically frozen.

Name: Volcanic Plate Mail
Description: Superior plate mail imbued with the elemental essence of flame and designed to withstand tremendous impact.

Name: Volcanic Salamander Suit
Description: A Salamander Suit reinforced with sturdy plates of volcanic iron. Extremely protective, and usable as a makeshift stove during long deployments.

Name: Iron Buckler
Description: A beaten little buckler made of iron that can withstand a bit more abuse than a Proto Shield.

Name: Proto Shield
Description: A small shield issued to all Spiral Knight recruits.

Name: Circuit Breaker Shield
Description: A Proto Shield modified to provide some protection against shock.

Name: Emberbreak Shield
Description: A Proto Shield modified to provide some protection against fire.

Name: Force Buckler
Description: A Proto Shield modified to resist stunning impacts.

Name: Frostbreaker Shield
Description: A Proto Shield modified to provide some protection against freeze.

Name: Green Ward
Description: A sturdy shield with an emerald sheen that saves Spiral Knight recruits from the perils of sharp spikes and deadly toxins.

Name: Scale Shield
Description: A very stylish shield made from lizard scales. While otherwise somewhat weak, the tight mesh of scales makes it highly resistant to pierce damage.

Name: Bristling Buckler
Description: A small shield spiked to supplement your sword in a skirmish.

Name: Defender
Description: A durable, high quality shield of the Spiral Order that is suitable for any adventure.

Name: Firebreak Shield
Description: An Emberbreak Shield modified for increased protection against fire.

Name: Honor Guard
Description: A ceremonial shield issued to Spiral Knight recruits. Though intended for formal occasions, its solid construction makes it suitable for combat use.

Name: Icebreaker Shield
Description: A Frostbreaker Shield modified for increased protection against freeze.

Name: Jelly Shield
Description: A strange looking shield created from jelly matter. Like many slime monsters themselves, it provides the user with exceptional defense against piercing damage.

Name: Owlite Shield
Description: A wooden ward carved with the crude image of a long-lost Owlite.

Name: Plate Shield
Description: A heavy iron shield adept at deflecting impacts that would otherwise leave you stunned.

Name: Skelly Shield
Description: A bedeviled buckler best used for blocking bad energy.

Name: Volt Breaker Shield
Description: A Circuit Breaker Shield modified for increased protection against shock.

Name: Airbraker Shield
Description: A lightweight, compact, and pneumatically-activated shield that expands its surface area against enemy attacks.

Name: Blazebreak Shield
Description: A reliable shield that'll keep you from getting too fired up in battle.

Name: Blizzbreaker Shield
Description: A reliable shield that'll prevent your foes from keeping you on ice.

Name: Boosted Plate Shield
Description: A beautifully refinished Plate Shield that's been given an internal power source to help keep the most battering of blows at bay.

Name: Brute Jelly Shield
Description: A thick shield made from the remains of particularly ill-mannered slimes. It is durable, light, and delightfully berry-flavored.

Name: Drake Scale Shield
Description: A solid shield shaped from stout scales.

Name: Great Defender
Description: A sturdy Defender upgraded with its own internal energy source for more effective protection.

Name: Grim Shell
Description: A shield alchemized from the shell of a corrupted tortodrone. Shadows seem to lengthen and cling to it whenever it is brought to bear.

Name: Great Honor Guard
Description: A ceremonial shield issued to seasoned Spiral Knights. Though intended for formal occasions, its solid construction makes it suitable for combat use.

Name: Horned Owlite Shield
Description: A sturdy shield similar to the sort said to have been carried by Owlite youth.

Name: Primal Shell
Description: A shield alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. The plates used in its construction provide some protection against the elements of fire and freeze.

Name: Raider Buckler
Description: A light wooden shield that blocks basic attacks and allows a countering swift strike.

Name: Scarlet Shield
Description: A shield found within the Scarlet Fortress. It grants the user extra health. Those that carry one have said that they can sometimes hear a faint heartbeat emanating from within it.

Name: Scary Skelly Shield
Description: A small, spooky shield to safeguard you from shadow.

Name: Ship Wheel
Description: How could this possibly make a good shield? Where did it even come from? Careful matey, ask those questions and you could be made to walk the plank.

Name: Stoic Shell
Description: A shield alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. While wielding it, you sense the quiet passing of the wind and can call upon the rumbling storm that follows.

Name: Surge Breaker Shield
Description: A reliable shield that'll help keep you grounded in battle.

Name: Swiftstrike Buckler
Description: A small, easy to use shield that enables the user to perform fast attacks.

Name: Twisted Targe
Description: A tulgey targe that will give your sword thrusts some teeth.

Name: Wild Shell
Description: A shield alchemized from a hardened tortodrone shell. It's tough enough to dull a jelly barb on impact.

Name: Barrier Shell
Description: A shield alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. The elemental resiliency of a tortodrone on the Long Migration should aid you on your own journies through harsh environments.

Name: Blackened Crest
Description: A shield once carried by a knight of Almire, now a cursed relic that has been nearly burned beyond recognition within the Firestorm Citadel. Very powerful alchemy would be required to restore it to its former glory.

Name: Dark Thorn Shield
Description: A gloomy guard that gives one's sword strikes a supernatural savagery.

Name: Feral Shell
Description: A shield alchemized from a hardened tortodrone shell. Even the sharpest wolver claws merely glance off this compact carapace.

Name: Heavy Plate Shield
Description: A huge reinforced shield perfect for brushing off blows and fending off foes.

Name: Mighty Honor Guard
Description: A ceremonial shield issued to Champions of the Spiral Order. Though intended for formal occasions, its solid construction makes it suitable for combat use.

Name: Mighty Defender
Description: An advanced Spiral Knight shield, reinforced for battle and beautifully embossed for the stories afterward.

Name: Mighty Shell
Description: A shield alchemized from the shell of a tortodrone. While wielding it, you can feel the berserk energies within just waiting to be unleashed.

Name: Nether Shell
Description: A shield alchemized from the shell of a corrupted tortodrone. A tormented howl of rage can be heard on the wind when this shield smashes through your foes.

Name: Rock Jelly Shield
Description: Crafted from the most adamant of slimy specimens, it also functions as an emergency source of calories for stranded knights.

Name: Shining Ward
Description: A sacred shield that protects the user from evil.

Name: Sinister Skelly Shield
Description: A kite shield haunted by a benevolent ghost. It should help you put up a spirited defense against shadow.

Name: Stone Tortoise
Description: A large, powerful shield made to resemble a creature's shell. Its formidable weight can make attacking more difficult.

Name: Stop Sign
Description: A strange shield capable of stopping many status attacks from harming the user. However it has an unnatural power that causes the user to come to a halt when behind it.

Name: Darkfang Shield
Description: A shield repurposed by gremlins and worn by Darkfang Thwackers. Similar to the gremlins themselves, it is resistant to fire and shock attacks. Knights who use these shields report that is impossible to completely remove all the fur stuck to it.

Name: Wise Owlite Shield
Description: It doesn't take a renowned Owlite scholar to figure out that defending oneself with a shield is an excellent idea.

Name: Wyvern Scale Shield
Description: A spiny buckler forged from beast chitin, providing ample resistance to both heat and venom.

Name: Aegis
Description: A sublime shield entrusted to only the most worthy members of the Spiral Order. Whether its crest is a relic from the Order of old or a creation from the Knights' time on Cradle is not immediately clear.

Name: Ancient Plate Shield
Description: An antique shield whose origins have been lost to the passing of time.

Name: Barbarous Thorn Shield
Description: A mythical shield imbued with the fury of the Snarbolax itself. It's said that the beast can use the glowing orbs on the shield's face to see and stalk weak-hearted wielders.

Name: Celestial Shield
Description: Cradle's equinox inspired the dual nature of this specialist shield, which protects against the dazzling light of day and the chill of night in equal measure.

Name: Crest of Almire
Description: A shimmering crest once proudly carried by the noble knights of Almire. It is said to bless those who fight for their homeland, granting them strength from within.

Name: Crystalline Defender
Description: A durable, high quality shield clad in protective glacial ice suitable for any adventure.

Name: Dragon Scale Shield
Description: A mythical shield crafted from the scales of a creature of legend.

Name: Dread Skelly Shield
Description: A large, bony bulwark bathed in blackish brume. It occasionally issues a quiet, forlorn whisper, usually about remembering to block.

Name: Gorgomega
Description: A terrifying shield that combines the dual-crushing power of a gorgo and the mythical tortomega. Crushing enemies has never been more fiendishly fun.

Name: Grand Tortoise
Description: A shield empowered by the limitless fury of a tortodrone. The very plates of this colossal carapace shake as the unstable energy within waits to be unleashed.

Name: Grey Owlite Shield
Description: A resplendent replica of the shield thought to have been issued to the most eminent of Owlite wizards. Wielding it fills you with righteous vengeance.

Name: Heater Shield
Description: A shield with a built-in furnace that keeps its user toasty warm, protecting them from most freeze attacks. Many knights also use it as a makeshift stove top when out in the field.

Name: Exalted Honor Guard
Description: A ceremonial shield issued to Vanguards of the Spiral Order. Though intended for formal occasions, its solid construction makes it suitable for combat use.

Name: Ironmight Plate Shield
Description: A superior shield forged from sun silver. The meaning of the crest on its face has been lost to time.

Name: Amethyst Node Slime Wall
Description: This weathered wobbling wall can withstand a walloping when wielded by unwaveringly willed warriors.

Name: Omega Shell
Description: A shield created from the armor of a Tortomega. The sheer weight of this powerful shield makes it only an option for the strongest of warriors.

Name: Omegaward
Description: The pulsing elemental plates of this shield instantaneously react to adverse climates protecting you from even the most extreme cold or heat.

Name: Power Mitt
Description: A must have in every kitchen. The comfortable fit and heavyweight silverweave surface are great for handling high heat. Now you're cooking with power!

Name: Royal Jelly Shield
Description: Prime protection for pretenders to the jelly throne.

Name: Savage Tortoise
Description: A shield alchemized from a hardened tortodrone shell. Even a rampaging wolver pack would have a hard time puncturing its reinforced plates.

Name: Teddy Bear Buckler
Description: A high-tech energy shield disguised as a harmless teddy bear. The perfect companion to defend against minions of the night.

Description: A high-tech energy shield disguised as a harmless teddy bear. The perfect companion to defend against minions of the night.

Name: The Bitter End
Description: A shield carried by all members of the Recon Rangers. Its name is a reminder to all Rangers as to precisely when they are permitted to drop it in battle.

Name: The Final Gasp
Description: A shield carried by all members of the Scarlet Scouts. Its name is a reminder to all Scouts as to precisely when they are permitted to drop it in battle.

Name: Volcanic Plate Shield
Description: A superior shield imbued with the elemental essence of flame. It is so resistant to high temperatures that it's a mystery how exactly it was forged in the first place.

Name: Early Riser Ring
Description: A curious circle coated with calcified slime.

Name: Dawn Bracelet
Description: A curious circle coated with calcified slime.

Name: Golden Solstice Ring
Description: An enchanted ring that embodies the spirit of the solstice. Its glittering golden luster shines brightest during the summer months.

Name: Silver Solstice Ring
Description: An enchanted ring that embodies the spirit of the solstice. Its sparkling silver luster shines brightest during the winter months.

Name: Daybreaker Band
Description: A curious circle coated with calcified slime.

Name: Gift of Autumn
Description: A rare charm cherished by travelers that fortifies the wearer during the winter season.

Name: Grand Solstice Ring
Description: A magnificent, enchanted ring that embodies the spirit of the solstice. Its surface seems to change color over time, sometimes hot and sometimes cold to the touch.

Name: Misplaced Promissory Note
Description: An old document promising to pay a sum at a date long gone. Grants Normal Defense and increased Defense with decreased health.

Name: Somnambulist's Totem
Description: An ordinary object with a unique texture and weight, the result of having been partially digested by a Sloombargo.

Name: True Love Locket
Description: A small, heart-shaped locket with an inscription reading "Processing thoughts of you always, Love Puppy"

Name: Cool Aero Helm
Description: A light, aerodynamic helmet sure to lift your attitude. It won't let you fly, so you'll just have to wing it.

Name: Chapeau of the Black Rose

The Knights of the Rose were said to be peerless fencers, believing that their blades were like the flowers of their name: a delicate thing of beauty that hides a vicious sting.

Name: Dangerous Brigandine
Description: Padded armor that seems to emphasize the high mortality rate of the elite Recon Rangers. Recon Rangers need to travel light and fast, often headlong into situations that would terrify other knights.

Name: Hazardous Brigandine
Description: Padded armor that seems to emphasize the high mortality rate of the elite Scarlet Scouts. Scarlet Scouts need to travel light and fast in order to stay ahead of lesser skilled squads.

Name: Dangerous Draped Armor
Description: Loose-fitting armor worn by more experienced Recon Rangers. It's rumored that gear like this is crafted from the remains of armor from Rangers who fell in combat, acting as a reminder to the wearer that they are always within Death's embrace.

Name: Hazardous Draped Armor
Description: Loose-fitting armor worn by more experienced Scarlet Scouts. It's rumored that gear like this is crafted from the remains of armor from Scouts who fell in combat, acting as a reminder that unless necessary Scouts never leave a man behind.

Name: Dangerous Hound Coat
Description: A battle-ravaged coat worn by the squad leaders of the Recon Rangers, nicknamed 'hounds.' The name was likely coined due to their incredible tracking abilities or perhaps the fact that they fight like wild dogs in battle.

Name: Hazardous Hedge Coat
Description: A battle-ravaged coat worn by the squad leaders of the Scarlet Scouts, nicknamed 'hedges.' The name was likely coined due to their incredible flanking abilities or perhaps it is a reference to the spikes that adorn their armor.

Name: Tabard of the Black Rose
Description: An aged, embroidered tabard that once belonged to a Knight of the Rose, a sacred order of brave and especially dashing heroes whose numerous adventures are the subject of many folk tales. The Knights of the Rose were said to be peerless fencers, believing that their blades were like the flowers of their name: a delicate thing of beauty that hides a vicious sting.

Name: Golden Slime Coin
Description: A slippery shekel exuded via protoplasmic alchemy, this coin is usable only at the Golden Slime Casino.

Name: Spark of Life
Description: A powerful charge of pure energy that instantly revives you or a fellow party member.

Name: Cracked Fire Crystal
Description: A rare, crystallized formation of heat used to forge higher levels of weapons and gear. Though cracked, it still glows ever so faintly.

Name: Dim Fire Crystal
Description: A rare, crystallized formation of heat used to forge higher levels of weapons and gear. The heat within flickers like a tiny candle.

Name: Flawed Orb of Alchemy
Description: A rare, encapsulated element used in alchemical transmutation. Though flawed, this orb is still useful in crafting low-powered items.

Name: Evo Catalyst
Description: A contained charge of highly unstable energy that can be synthesized by battle sprites. In doing so, sprites can evolve into greater forms and learn new skills.

Name: Warm Fire Crystal
Description: A rare, crystallized formation of heat used to forge higher levels of weapons and gear. The heat within burns strong enough that it feels warm to the touch.

Name: Simple Orb of Alchemy
Description: A rare, encapsulated element used in alchemical transmutation. While unrefined, this orb can be used to craft more powerful items.

Name: Glowing Fire Crystal
Description: A rare, crystallized formation of heat used to forge higher levels of weapons and gear. The heat within burns bright enough to light a darkened room.

Name: Advanced Orb of Alchemy
Description: A rare, encapsulated element used in alchemical transmutation. This orb is exceptional and can be used to craft very powerful items.

Name: Advanced Evo Catalyst
Description: A contained charge of highly unstable energy that can be synthesized by battle sprites. In doing so, sprites can evolve into even more advanced forms with even more powerful skills.

Name: Shining Fire Crystal
Description: A rare, crystallized formation of heat used to forge higher levels of weapons and gear. The heat within burns like a star shining in the night sky.

Name: Elite Orb of Alchemy
Description: A rare, encapsulated element used in alchemical transmutation. Orbs like these are used by elite knights to craft items of exceptional quality and power.

Name: Ultimate Evo Catalyst
Description: A contained charge of highly unstable energy that can be synthesized by battle sprites. In doing so, sprites can evolve into their ultimate forms and harness the power of their ultimate skills.

Name: Radiant Fire Crystal
Description: A rare, crystallized formation of heat used to forge higher levels of weapons and gear. The heat within is wild and mysterious, shining brighter than any natural fire.

Name: Eternal Orb of Alchemy
Description: A rare, encapsulated element used in alchemical transmutation. This orb is prized by the most powerful knights and is used to craft items of extraordinary power.

Name: Crimsonite
Description: A fabled mineral of a fiery, red color said to contain the passion, anger and strength of the life surrounding it.

Name: Dark Matter
Description: A fabled mineral dark and ominous in color said to contain the essences of both chaos and nothingness.

Name: Luminite
Description: A fabled mineral of a radiant, golden color said to contain the faith, wisdom and zeal of the life surrounding it.

Name: Moonstone
Description: A fabled mineral of a brilliant, blue color said to contain the knowledge and origins of all worlds.

Name: Valestone
Description: A fabled mineral of a vibrant, green color said to contain the essence of all natural life.

Name: Blue Shard
Description: A shard of Moonstone that is too small to be used in powering gates but highly useful in alchemy.

Name: Dark Shard
Description: A shard of Dark Matter that is too small to be used in powering gates but highly useful in alchemy.

Name: Green Shard
Description: A shard of Valestone that is too small to be used in powering gates but highly useful in alchemy.

Name: Light Shard
Description: A shard of Luminite that is too small to be used in powering gates but highly useful in alchemy.

Name: Red Shard
Description: A shard of Crimsonite that is too small to be used in powering gates but highly useful in alchemy.

Name: Cosmic Mote
Description: A small morsel of special food favored by battle sprites who hail from space deep beyond the furthest of stars.

Name: Divine Mote
Description: A small morsel of special food favored by battle sprites who forever bask in the light of the heavens.

Name: Power Mote
Description: A small morsel of special food favored by battle sprites who align themselves with forces that grant them brute strength on the battlefield.

Name: Shadow Mote
Description: A small morsel of special food favored by battle sprites who gain their powers using forbidden, dark arts.

Name: Wild Mote
Description: A small morsel of special food favored by battle sprites who are deeply connected to the natural order of the great wilderness.

Name: Beast Scale
Description: A relatively intact scale recovered from a Clockworks creature.

Name: Brimstone
Description: A smelly, stygian, sulfuric shard commonly found in the Underworld.

Name: Bronze Bolt
Description: A simple bronze bolt found everywhere throughout the Clockworks.

Name: Ecto Drop
Description: A bit of ectoplasm meticulously collected from an unwilling undead volunteer. It's an unpleasant shade of green.

Name: Enamorock
Description: A strange stone that makes you have warm and fuzzy feelings inside just by holding it.

Name: Gel Drop
Description: A drop of goo collected from a jelly. It's still quivering.

Name: Scrap Metal
Description: A discarded piece of metal that could be easily repurposed.

Name: Fractured Seerus Mask Fragment
Description: A fractured fragment of the mask once worn by Warmaster Seerus, recovered from the siege of his Grand Arsenal.

Name: Sharp Fang
Description: A particularly pointy premolar. Or maybe it's a canine?

Name: Spark Plug
Description: A small, mechanical component that really gets a construct's motor running.

Name: Compact Supply Pack
Description: A package of useful supplies valued by Spiral Knight research teams working deep within the Clockworks.  This compact pack has enough supplies to last a single Knight one week.

Name: Vile Seal
Description: A small scrap of ancient parchment imbued with dark magicks. It is believed that they grant power to those with evil souls.

Name: Cosmic Dust
Description: A portion of special food favored by battle sprites who hail from space deep beyond the furthest of stars.

Name: Divine Dust
Description: A portion of special food favored by battle sprites who forever bask in the light of the heavens.

Name: Power Dust
Description: A portion of special food favored by battle sprites who align themselves with forces that grant them brute strength on the battlefield.

Name: Shadow Dust
Description: A portion of special food favored by battle sprites who gain their powers using forbidden, dark arts.

Name: Wild Dust
Description: A portion of special food favored by battle sprites who are deeply connected to the natural order of the great wilderness.

Name: Blast Powder
Description: A dangerous by-product produced by fire-based organic creatures. Gremlins like to use it to blow stuff up.

Name: Cooling Cell
Description: A small device used in complex machines to keep them from overheating. Also handy to keep in your pockets on hot summer days.

Name: Critter Carapace
Description: A chitinous chunk carefully shucked from a Clockworks creature. It's in surprisingly good shape.

Name: Driftwood
Description: A peculiar piece of wood that just won't stay put.

Name: Forbidden Fruit
Description: A sinful snack favored by famished fiends.

Name: Frayed Fabric
Description: The worn remains of a Clockworks denizen's duds. It could probably be recycled.

Name: Frost Gel
Description: A drop of chilly gunk collected from a cool Clockworks customer.

Name: Fuel Canister
Description: A small receptacle once used to hold fuel for a complex machine.

Name: Gel Core
Description: A fist-sized, gelatinous lump collected from a jelly.

Name: Grave Soil
Description: Dreadful dirt dredged from a creepy crypt. It is always a little cold to the touch.

Name: Gremlin Gizmo
Description: A strange device used in gremlin machinery. It is inscribed with a warning against exposing it to direct sunlight or submerging it in water.

Name: Iron Gear
Description: A metal gear that was once a component of a complicated contraption.

Name: Monster Bone
Description: An intact bone from a now-deceased beast.

Name: Nightshade
Description: A hazardous herb that's bad for most beasts, but tasty to a teeming variety of toxic creatures.

Name: Owlite Feather
Description: A small feather plucked from an Owlite, said to be a mythical race of great magician birds.

Name: Power Cell
Description: A small device used to power complex machines.

Name: Sinful Brew
Description: A noxious drink favored by all fiends. Despite its prevalence, it's officially outlawed in the Underworld as a marketing ploy.

Name: Static Clinger
Description: A latent strand of energy that floats throughout the Clockworks, frequently catching on hair and clothing. It's too large to properly distill into Energy, but it's very useful in alchemy.

Name: Swordstone
Description: A fine chunk of natural rock perfect for honing the edge of a deadly blade.

Name: Waste Module
Description: A small receptacle that once collected refuse from a device built to wreak havoc. Now, it just plain reeks.

Name: Cosmic Stone
Description: A concentrated lump of special food favored by battle sprites who hail from space deep beyond the furthest of stars.

Name: Divine Stone
Description: A concentrated lump of special food favored by battle sprites who forever bask in the light of the heavens.

Name: Power Stone
Description: A concentrated lump of special food favored by battle sprites who align themselves with forces that grant them brute strength on the battlefield.

Name: Shadow Stone
Description: A concentrated lump of special food favored by battle sprites who gain their powers using forbidden, dark arts.

Name: Wild Stone
Description: A concentrated lump of special food favored by battle sprites who are deeply connected to the natural order of the great wilderness.

Name: Ancient Shell
Description: A fragment of resilient Tortodrone shell. It is rumored that by sleeping on a Tortodrone shell, one can feel the subtle vibrations that call these mighty beings towards the Long Migration's mysterious final destination.

Name: Brute Core
Description: An oozing blue lump from a particularly potent gelatinous opponent.

Name: Bushy Tail
Description: A peculiarly intact specimen of a Clockworks beast's tail.

Name: Dead Gold
Description: A coin placed into the hands of the dead before burial, granting them fare for the long journey ahead.

Name: Drake Scale
Description: A solid scale wrested from a brutal beast.

Name: Fiendish Amu Glyph
Description: A fragment of a Fiendish ID Card. Combining five different glyphs into an ID Card will allow you to open the Grim Gate in the Ancient Grove.

Name: Fiendish Ur Glyph
Description: A fragment of a Fiendish ID Card. Combining five different glyphs into an ID Card will allow you to open the Grim Gate in the Ancient Grove.

Name: Fiendish Tor Glyph
Description: A fragment of a Fiendish ID Card. Combining five different glyphs into an ID Card will allow you to open the Grim Gate in the Ancient Grove.

Name: Fiendish Nok Glyph
Description: A fragment of a Fiendish ID Card. Combining five different glyphs into an ID Card will allow you to open the Grim Gate in the Ancient Grove.

Name: Fiendish Sol Glyph
Description: A fragment of a Fiendish ID Card. Combining five different glyphs into an ID Card will allow you to open the Grim Gate in the Ancient Grove.

Name: Fiendish ID Card
Description: Using this will allow you to open and pass through the Grim Gate in the Ancient Grove.

Name: Fine Fabric
Description: A well-made length of sturdy cloth, swiped from a Clockworks inhabitant.

Name: Force Dynamo
Description: A beguiling gadget that can seemingly generate energy from nowhere.

Name: Hailstone
Description: A small rock that's always a little cold to the touch. It's great for chilling beverages without diluting their flavor.

Name: Lump of Coal
Description: A Grinchlin gift for those who have been naughty or nice.  Grinchlins are equal opportunity party poopers.

Name: Obsidian Shard
Description: A jet-black shard of unnatural stone. Holding it fills your head with imagery of a distant shore where waves crash against rocks that seem to writhe in the chill of the water.

Name: Phial of Phear
Description: A glass tube containing a small dose of phearium, a strange chemical said to induce panic into anyone who even gets so much as a whiff of the stuff.

Name: Redwood
Description: A sturdy chunk of fine, unfinished wood. It's typically used in the production of cabinets.

Name: Rock Salt
Description: A small amount of Clockworks mineral that's been infused with absolutely nothing. It hungrily draws at nearby essences and flavors, making it a staple in cooking, and the bane of jellies everywhere.

Name: Rocket Sprocket
Description: A sturdy sprocket used by machines that fire projectiles.

Name: Flawed Seerus Mask Fragment
Description: A flawed fragment of the mask once worn by Warmaster Seerus, recovered from the siege of his Grand Arsenal.

Name: Soul Dust
Description: The dust of the departed. Whether it still retains any shred of a soul remains to be seen.

Name: Spoiled Treat
Description: A terrible tummy ache awaits those who partake in the fetid fare of Winterfest past.

Name: Standard Supply Pack
Description: A package of useful supplies valued by Spiral Knight research teams working deep within the Clockworks.  This standard pack has enough supplies to last a few Knights one week.

Name: Torchstone
Description: A small rock that smolders constantly. Gremlins patrolling the Cooling Chambers occasionally use them as a hand warmer.

Name: Toxic Core
Description: A solid, pulsating lump that oozes with vitriol.

Name: Unstable Core
Description: A hazardous hunk pulled from a fulminating foe. It hums menacingly.

Name: Volt Oil
Description: A slippery substance that always holds a slight electrical charge.

Name: Wicked Idol
Description: One of many statuettes carried by fiends as a means of gaining favor with their dark gods. The most valuable ones are 'MIBE' (mint in box of evil).

Name: Zee Core
Description: A pungent mass pulled from a slimy assailant. Its aroma is an excellent remedy for insomnia, as well as nighttime sniffling and sneezing.

Name: Cosmic Orb
Description: A lustrous sphere of special food favored by battle sprites who hail from space deep beyond the furthest of stars.

Name: Divine Orb
Description: A lustrous sphere of special food favored by battle sprites who forever bask in the light of the heavens.

Name: Power Orb
Description: A lustrous sphere of special food favored by battle sprites who align themselves with forces that grant them brute strength on the battlefield.

Name: Shadow Orb
Description: A lustrous sphere of special food favored by battle sprites who gain their powers using forbidden, dark arts.

Name: Wild Orb
Description: A lustrous sphere of special food favored by battle sprites who are deeply connected to the natural order of the great wilderness.

Name: Binding Essence
Description: A strange, vile reagent thought to be harnessed by the Apocrea to build their structures. Once it gets on your skin it seems to never wash off. No, it must, you simply need to scrub harder. Harder, yes...

Name: Blaze Pepper
Description: A delectable spice prized by Clockwork denizens of all sorts. In powdered form, it has a terrible habit of clinging to absolutely everything.

Name: Blighted Bone
Description: A peculiar patella that's seen better days, after having seen a few better knights.

Name: Bottomless Stocking
Description: An interdimensional tear in this fuzzy fabric sock swallows any item placed within it.  It even swallowed the stitches.

Name: Chroma Tear
Description: A crystallized Chromalisk tear suitable as a lens for focusing weaponry, or for correcting myopia.

Name: Corrosive Acid
Description: A caustic substance characteristic of corrosive creatures.

Name: Ghost Bell
Description: A small, silvery bell worn by considerate ghosts that alerts the living when they are close by.

Name: Heavy Gear
Description: A weighted gear that previously assisted in the operation of an enormous machine.

Name: Ironwood
Description: A pristine log of one of the hardest substances known to the Spiral Knights.

Name: Kat Tribe Fetish
Description: A tattered fetish from the now-extinct Kat Tribe, the ferocious feline warriors responsible for the destruction of the Owlites and their prestigious High Academy of Magicks. The fetishes were carried into battle by Kat warriors and are said to bring good luck despite the ill fate of the Kat Tribe itself.

Name: Meteor Mote
Description: A small piece of a rare material that is said to have fallen from the sky. Gremlins typically use it in the construction of power sources.

Name: Miracloth
Description: A marvelous bolt of sublimely supple fabric.

Name: Mod Calibrator
Description: This complicated device was specially built to calibrate mods, and should not be confused with a Calibrator Mod, which modifies calibrators. It's a common mistake.

Name: Mug of Misery
Description: A cursed drinking utility that can only be used by a truly wicked soul. Those that possess it are said to bring grave misfortune to those around them.

Name: Perfect Snowball
Description: An icy snowball of almost mythical perfection. Though it begs to be thrown squarely into the side of someone's head, it would be best to use in alchemy.

Name: Punkin Sprout
Description: A small sprig capable of growing into a grand gourd.

Name: Razor Ribbon
Description: Remember: when handling Grinchlin giftboxes, always wear your plate mail gauntlets.

Name: Rocky Core
Description: A delicious gummy treat with an impenetrable rocky shell. More than a few teeth have been lost by knights attempting to get at the gooey interior.

Name: Silver Coil
Description: An electromagnetic mechanism made of an extremely conductive metal.

Name: Thunderball
Description: An orb of pure electricity that is typically found at the bottom of the sea of all places.

Name: Trojan Horseshoe
Description: A jet black horseshoe. It appears relatively harmless.

Name: Warp Dust
Description: A light dust left behind when a creature travels at unbelievable speed. It tastes great in dip.

Name: Cosmic Star
Description: A perfect crystalization of special food favored by battle sprites who hail from space deep beyond the furthest of stars.

Name: Divine Star
Description: A perfect crystalization of special food favored by battle sprites who forever bask in the light of the heavens.

Name: Power Star
Description: A perfect crystalization of special food favored by battle sprites who align themselves with forces that grant them brute strength on the battlefield.

Name: Shadow Star
Description: A perfect crystalization of special food favored by battle sprites who gain their powers using forbidden, dark arts.

Name: Wild Star
Description: A perfect crystalization of special food favored by battle sprites who are deeply connected to the natural order of the great wilderness.

Name: Book of Dark Rituals
Description: An ancient grimoire filled with unspeakable eldritch rites. Just like any cursed tome, there is likely some twisted individual out there who wants it for extremely nefarious purposes. Trade with caution.

Name: Celestial Ore
Description: An extremely rare metal of great power said to be from the heavens above.  It is often completely wasted on crowns and jewelry for slime royalty.

Name: Crest of Ur
Description: A crest from the lost Legion of Ur, an elite band of fiendish warriors said to have once conquered the Underworld. Whomever holds it can faintly hear the sound of drums and the clomping of hooves.

Name: Dark Ember
Description: A mote of burning energy salvaged from Lord Vanaduke's throne room. It slowly smolders with a sinister intensity, creating an almost hypnotic trance when gazed upon for any length of time.

Name: Dragon Scale
Description: An armored scale from what was thought to be an extinct creature. It reflects light with an otherworldly sheen.

Name: Everfrost
Description: A small patch of ice crystals that never seem to melt, even when exposed to direct heat.

Name: Flame Soul
Description: A powerful essence left behind when a creature perishes during a blind, fiery rage.

Name: Gremlonium
Description: A highly advanced compound created by gremlin engineers to power their most devious machines.  It constantly emits an unsettling hissing sound.

Name: Indestructible Giftwrap
Description: Presents wrapped with this Grinchlin gag can never be opened again. Leave it to Grinchlins to ruin complimentary gift wrapping services for everyone.

Name: Jelly Glue
Description: A viscous compound developed by Biotechs to allow for the study of slime creatures. When mixed with slime and jelly matter, it allows for reshaping without losing its form. Though reserved for scientific purposes, the process is generally regarded as 'super fun.'

Name: Maiden's Tear
Description: A sacred jewel cherished by Almirian knights.  Given to them by their beloved, it is said to keep them safe in battle.

Name: Nightmare Mane
Description: A coat of coarse fur taken from a Snarbolax.  Each fiber seems to curl and fray as if life is still flowing through it.

Name: Perplexing Element
Description: A rare metal recovered from a shattered mountain deep within the realm of the Apocrea. Under a microscope it reveals to have a kind of impossible geometry. Perhaps more dedicated study, free from the distractions of the world would reveal its secrets.

Name: Philoso Feather
Description: A large, grey feather plucked from the greatest of the Owlite magicians.

Name: Plague Essence
Description: A powerful essence left behind when a creature perishes from a particularly putrid disease.

Name: Plasma Cell
Description: A high-tech plasma source that could positively blind someone with science.

Name: Primal Ore
Description: An extraordinary metal imbued with the savage spirit of the wild.

Name: Reaper Rib
Description: A bone stained black by the wickedness of its former possessor.

Name: Royal Core
Description: A sweet-smelling lump of ooze collected from a particularly noble specimen of slime.

Name: Royal Skewer
Description: A jagged, razor-sharp barb from one of the most powerful slimes on Cradle. Once removed from the slime it grows brittle and eventually turns to dust.

Name: Schemer Scrap
Description: A fragment of a blueprint used by gremlin schemers to construct their mechanical monstrosities. With enough of them and a little tape, you could construct a metal death machine yourself!

Name: Perfect Seerus Mask Fragment
Description: A perfect fragment of the mask once worn by Warmaster Seerus, recovered from the siege of his Grand Arsenal.

Name: Shadow Steel
Description: An extraordinary metal imbued with the creeping darkness of the Underworld.

Name: Silverweave
Description: A length of understated cloth intricately interwoven with precious metal. It's tastefully ostentatious, yet prudently protective.

Name: Snarbostuffing
Description: A dense, fluffy stuffing made from a special polymer that doesn't break down when exposed to the cursed fur of the Snarbolax. It's perfect for creating trophies or adorable, cursed, stuffed toys.

Name: Storm Chaser
Description: A rare elemental found hovering in storm clouds. Their electric hum creates an almost melodic choir that can be faintly heard between thunderclaps.

Name: Sun Silver
Description: An extraordinary metal imbued with the radiant light of the sky.

Name: Deluxe Supply Pack
Description: A package of useful supplies valued by Spiral Knight research teams working deep within the Clockworks.  This deluxe pack has enough supplies to last an entire squad of Knights one week.

Name: Volcanic Iron
Description: An extraordinary metal imbued with the blazing energy of magma.

Name: Wicked Whisker
Description: A whisker won from the great Kat Tribe hero, Margrel. They were traditionally worn as a ward against Owlite magics but now represent the triumph of goodly magical arts over evil.

Name: Cracked Fire Crystal Recipe
Description: A rare, crystallized formation of heat used to forge higher levels of weapons and gear. Though cracked, it still glows ever so faintly.

Name: Circuit Breaker Armor Recipe
Description: Armor with a hacked elemental core aimed at resisting shock. However, this non-standard modification creates other elemental weaknesses.

Name: Emberbreak Armor Recipe
Description: Armor with a hacked elemental core aimed at resisting fire. However, this non-standard modification creates other elemental weaknesses.

Name: Frostbreaker Armor Recipe
Description: Armor with a hacked elemental core aimed at resisting freeze. However, this non-standard modification creates other elemental weaknesses.

Name: Padded Armor Recipe
Description: A loose-fitting set of light armor that is typically worn by gunslingers.

Name: Spiral Scale Mail Recipe
Description: Durable, light mail that provides protection from piercing attacks.

Name: Cold Snap Recipe
Description: A Proto Bomb modified to generate small bursts of frost upon detonation.

Name: Firecracker Recipe
Description: A Proto Bomb modified to generate small bursts of fire upon detonation.

Name: Frost Gun Recipe
Description: A modified Proto Gun augmented with a low intensity, alchemical freezing agent.

Name: Pummel Gun Recipe
Description: A Punch Gun properly modified for combat use. The recoil from its powerful charge attack is notorious amongst recruits.

Name: Super Stun Gun Recipe
Description: An upgraded Stun Gun whose powerful blast will discourage even the most disconcerting of Clockworks monsters.

Name: Zapper Recipe
Description: A modified Proto Gun augmented with a low intensity electrical charge.

Name: Circuit Breaker Helm Recipe
Description: A Spiral Helm modified to provide additional protection against shock, at the expense of fire and freeze resistance.

Name: Emberbreak Helm Recipe
Description: A Spiral Helm modified to provide additional protection against fire, at the expense of freeze and shock resistance.

Name: Frostbreaker Helm Recipe
Description: A Spiral Helm modified to provide additional protection against freeze, at the expense of fire and shock resistance.

Name: Padded Cap Recipe
Description: A one size fits all light helm that is typically worn by gunslingers.

Name: Spiral Scale Helm Recipe
Description: A light mail helm that slightly shields oneself from piercing strikes.

Name: Dim Fire Crystal Recipe
Description: A rare, crystallized formation of heat used to forge higher levels of weapons and gear. The heat within flickers like a tiny candle.

Name: Circuit Breaker Shield Recipe
Description: A Proto Shield modified to provide some protection against shock.

Name: Emberbreak Shield Recipe
Description: A Proto Shield modified to provide some protection against fire.

Name: Force Buckler Recipe
Description: A Proto Shield modified to resist stunning impacts.

Name: Frostbreaker Shield Recipe
Description: A Proto Shield modified to provide some protection against freeze.

Name: Scale Shield Recipe
Description: A very stylish shield made from lizard scales. While otherwise somewhat weak, the tight mesh of scales makes it highly resistant to pierce damage.

Name: Big Beast Basher Recipe
Description: It was suggested that this brutally sharp mining pick could probably be used to hunt both beasts AND minerals. The Clockworks were never the same.

Name: Bolted Blade Recipe
Description: An upgraded Proto Sword reinforced with bronze bolts scavenged from the Clockworks.

Name: Heavy Hatchet Recipe
Description: A big blade intended to fell trees. Unsurprisingly, you can also use it to fell enemies, blocks, mineral deposits and most anything else you'd care to hit with it.

Name: Hot Edge Recipe
Description: A modified Proto Sword capable of generating temperatures high enough to burn organic material.

Name: Rugged Robo Wrecker Recipe
Description: An upgraded robo wrecker that has assisted a great many constructs in becoming smoldering, scrap metal heaps.

Name: Static Edge Recipe
Description: A modified Proto Sword capable of generating a low-intensity electrical charge.

Name: Super Slime Slasher Recipe
Description: A shovel with a wicked edge that's especially well-suited to fighting slimes in the trenches.

Name: Thwack Hammer Recipe
Description: A spirited spanner specially suited to scrapping mechanical enemies.

Name: Cobalt Armor Recipe
Description: High-performance armor of the Spiral Order suitable for any adventure.

Name: Firebreak Armor Recipe
Description: Upgraded Emberbreak armor further hacked to resist fire.

Name: Icebreaker Armor Recipe
Description: Upgraded Frostbreaker Armor further hacked to resist freeze.

Name: Jelly Mail Recipe
Description: A squishy set of armor made from slippery slimes that simply oozes with style.

Name: Magic Cloak Recipe
Description: A wondrous robe worn by apprentices in the art of spells and sorcery.

Name: Pathfinder Armor Recipe
Description: A handy set of armor for blazing trails and protecting against the bites of hungry monsters in the wild.

Name: Sentinel Armor Recipe
Description: A suit of armor imbued with the power to repel the various afflictions that knights might encounter in the line of duty.

Name: Shade Armor Recipe
Description: A suit of armor infused with dark matter that allows its wearer to shoot straight and surprise foes from the shadows.

Name: Skelly Suit Recipe
Description: A bone-chilling outfit that naturally wards off shadowy attacks.

Name: Spiral Demo Suit Recipe
Description: Sturdy armor designed for use by explosively-inclined knights.

Name: Spiral Plate Mail Recipe
Description: Heavyweight armor made of iron plates that can withstand a great deal of standard attacks.

Name: Vitasuit Plus Recipe
Description: High-tech mail that provides the wearer with myriad medical boons, including bonus health, glossier hair, and fresher breath.

Name: Volt Breaker Armor Recipe
Description: Upgraded Circuit Breaker Armor further hacked to resist shock.

Name: Wolver Coat Recipe
Description: A thick garment to protect your hide, made from a Wolver who failed to protect his.

Name: Blast Bomb Recipe
Description: An all-purpose bomb issued to Spiral Knights who have proven themselves in the field.

Name: Crystal Bomb Recipe
Description: A shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in an alloy of Moonstone and Valestone. Its soothing shade of cerulean has been clinically proven to both calm knights and annihilate the undead.

Name: Dark Matter Bomb Recipe
Description: A shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in Dark Matter. Since its original discovery, Dark Matter has been put to a variety of uses, from powering Spiral technology, to rearranging Gremlins on a subatomic level.

Name: Fiery Vaporizer Recipe
Description: An alchemical bomb that creates a cloud of highly combustible mist.

Name: Freezing Vaporizer Recipe
Description: An alchemical bomb that produces a cloud of ultra-low temperature mist.

Name: Haze Bomb Recipe
Description: An alchemical bomb that creates a noxious cloud capable of stunning those caught inside.

Name: Shard Bomb Recipe
Description: A shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in depleted Crimsonite. Depleted or not, this sucker can sling some serious shrapnel.

Name: Slumber Smogger Recipe
Description: An alchemical bomb that fogs an area with a sleep agent.

Name: Splinter Bomb Recipe
Description: A shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in a synthetic mineral. Prone to shattering, the otherwise useless material in this bomb is perfect for giving foes a nasty splinter.

Name: Toxic Vaporizer Recipe
Description: An alchemical bomb that produces a noxious cloud of toxins.

Name: Autogun Recipe
Description: A fully automatic handgun capable of rapidly firing powerful bolts of energy.

Name: Blaster Recipe
Description: A versatile handgun issued to Spiral Knights who have proven themselves in the field.

Name: Cryotech Alchemer Recipe
Description: An alchemical handgun that fires hyper low temperature bullets that split on impact.

Name: Firotech Alchemer Recipe
Description: An alchemical handgun that fires bullets of liquid flames that split on impact.

Name: Prismatech Alchemer Recipe
Description: An alchemical handgun that fires bullets of photon-charged liquid that split on impact.

Name: Shadowtech Alchemer Recipe
Description: An alchemical handgun that fires bullets of concentrated shadow that split on impact.

Name: Voltech Alchemer Recipe
Description: An alchemical handgun that fires highly charged ionic bullets that split on impact.

Name: Cobalt Helm Recipe
Description: A high-performance helmet of the Spiral Order suitable for any adventure.

Name: Firebreak Helm Recipe
Description: An Emberbreak Helm modified to provide further protection against fire.

Name: Icebreaker Helm Recipe
Description: A Frostbreaker Helm modified to provide further protection against freeze.

Name: Jelly Helm Recipe
Description: Gelatinous headgear made from gooey guardians.

Name: Magic Hood Recipe
Description: An enchanting hood for knights who dabble in divination and contemplate conjuring.

Name: Pathfinder Helm Recipe
Description: A helm handy for blazing trails and protecting against the bites of hungry monsters in the wild.

Name: Sentinel Helm Recipe
Description: A helm imbued with the power to repel the various afflictions that knights might encounter in the line of duty.

Name: Shade Helm Recipe
Description: A dark matter infused helm that allows its wearer to get the drop on foes by shooting straight from the shadows.

Name: Skelly Mask Recipe
Description: A spooky mask good for both scaring children and protecting from shadow attacks.

Name: Spiral Demo Helm Recipe
Description: A sturdy helm designed for use by explosively-inclined knights.

Name: Spiral Plate Helm Recipe
Description: A heavyweight helm made of iron designed to withstand stunning impacts.

Name: Volt Breaker Helm Recipe
Description: A Circuit Breaker Helm modified to provide further protection against shock.

Name: Wolver Cap Recipe
Description: A lively hat made from significantly less lively Wolver hide.

Name: Warm Fire Crystal Recipe
Description: A rare, crystallized formation of heat used to forge higher levels of weapons and gear. The heat within burns strong enough that it feels warm to the touch.

Name: Defender Recipe
Description: A durable, high quality shield of the Spiral Order that is suitable for any adventure.

Name: Firebreak Shield Recipe
Description: An Emberbreak Shield modified for increased protection against fire.

Name: Icebreaker Shield Recipe
Description: A Frostbreaker Shield modified for increased protection against freeze.

Name: Jelly Shield Recipe
Description: A strange looking shield created from jelly matter. Like many slime monsters themselves, it provides the user with exceptional defense against piercing damage.

Name: Owlite Shield Recipe
Description: A wooden ward carved with the crude image of a long-lost Owlite.

Name: Plate Shield Recipe
Description: A heavy iron shield adept at deflecting impacts that would otherwise leave you stunned.

Name: Skelly Shield Recipe
Description: A bedeviled buckler best used for blocking bad energy.

Name: Volt Breaker Shield Recipe
Description: A Circuit Breaker Shield modified for increased protection against shock.

Name: Brandish Recipe
Description: A reliable blade whose lack of ornamentation belies its strength.

Name: Calibur Recipe
Description: A standard issue sword awarded to Spiral Knights who have proven themselves in the field.

Name: Cutter Recipe
Description: A bandit's sword with a vicious row of jagged teeth.

Name: Flourish Recipe
Description: A stylish saber well-appointed to foiling your enemies.

Name: Searing Edge Recipe
Description: A light blade that sets foes ablaze as it slashes. The technology that keeps the hilt from catching fire is more advanced than the sword itself.

Name: Shocking Edge Recipe
Description: A light blade that can deliver a painful shock to its victims. Youthful knights enjoy waving these around on holidays.

Name: Spur Recipe
Description: A mechanized sword with a built in motor that generates energy bursts when used.

Name: Troika Recipe
Description: A low-tech sword that makes up for its lack of high internal power with sheer weight and size. It is capable of delivering crushing blows for those that can handle it.

Name: Wrench Wand Recipe
Description: A heavy hand tool favored by Gremlins. It's good for both tightening bolts and cracking skulls.

Name: Angelic Raiment Recipe
Description: A beautiful suit of armor that constantly shines as if illuminated by the sun.

Name: Blazebreak Armor Recipe
Description: A reliable set of armor adept at deflecting the most fiery of rhetoric. It's not bad at resisting flame attacks, either.

Name: Blizzbreaker Armor Recipe
Description: A reliable set of armor adept at shrugging off the coldest of shoulders. It's not bad at resisting freeze attacks, either.

Name: Boosted Plate Mail Recipe
Description: A suit of Spiral Plate Mail with a supercharged internal power source. The upgrade didn't make the armor any lighter.

Name: Brute Jelly Mail Recipe
Description: A firm set of mucilaginous mail crafted from the remains of particularly antagonistic jellies.

Name: Chroma Suit Recipe
Description: A suit crafted from the hide of a chromalisk. Surprisingly, chromalisks seem to find the existence of these armors flattering.

Name: Drake Scale Mail Recipe
Description: Armor forged from the scales of beasts thought to be the descendants of dragons.

Name: Dusker Coat Recipe
Description: A warm adventurer's coat that'll let you strike with the ferocity of an Alpha Dusker.

Name: Elemental Cloak Recipe
Description: A fine robe with numerous forms of elemental protection woven right into the fabric.

Name: Fused Demo Suit Recipe
Description: An upgraded Demo Suit fused dangerously with the unstable core from a powerful Blast Cube. Even still, you should feel a lot safer wearing this.

Name: Gunslinger Sash Recipe
Description: Clothing worn by pistol-packing warriors from a forgotten time. They smell of rawhide, gun smoke and action.

Name: Padded Demo Suit Recipe
Description: An upgraded suit for bombers that is lined with soft, stimulating padding.

Name: Padded Hunting Coat Recipe
Description: An upgraded coat for hunters that is lined with soft, stimulating padding.

Name: Scary Skelly Suit Recipe
Description: An upgraded Skelly Suit infused with the elemental essence of fear. It comes standard with matching pants that cannot be scared off.

Name: Solid Cobalt Armor Recipe
Description: A sturdy set of Cobalt Armor reforged for additional comfort and protection.

Name: Surge Breaker Armor Recipe
Description: A reliable set of armor adept at weathering the most shocking of revelations. It's not bad at resisting electric attacks, either.

Name: Woven Falcon Pathfinder Armor Recipe
Description: A flexible suit of armor built for mobility and interlaced with slime fibers to protect against prickly and thorny foes.

Name: Woven Firefly Pathfinder Armor Recipe
Description: A flexible suit of armor built for mobility and interlaced with slime fibers to protect against prickly and thorny foes.

Name: Woven Grizzly Pathfinder Armor Recipe
Description: A flexible suit of armor built for mobility and interlaced with slime fibers to protect against prickly and thorny foes.

Name: Woven Snakebite Pathfinder Armor Recipe
Description: A flexible suit of armor built for mobility and interlaced with slime fibers to protect against prickly and thorny foes.

Name: Woven Falcon Sentinel Armor Recipe
Description: A suit of armor imbued with interwoven wolver hair to protect against even the harshest elements.

Name: Woven Firefly Sentinel Armor Recipe
Description: A suit of armor imbued with interwoven wolver hair to protect against even the harshest elements.

Name: Woven Grizzly Sentinel Armor Recipe
Description: A suit of armor imbued with interwoven wolver hair to protect against even the harshest elements.

Name: Woven Snakebite Sentinel Armor Recipe
Description: A suit of armor imbued with interwoven wolver hair to protect against even the harshest elements.

Name: Woven Falcon Shade Armor Recipe
Description: A loose fitting suit of armor that enables its wearer to slink through the shadows and assault unaware enemies.

Name: Woven Firefly Shade Armor Recipe
Description: A loose fitting suit of armor that enables its wearer to slink through the shadows and assault unaware enemies.

Name: Woven Grizzly Shade Armor Recipe
Description: A loose fitting suit of armor that enables its wearer to slink through the shadows and assault unaware enemies.

Name: Woven Snakebite Shade Armor Recipe
Description: A loose fitting suit of armor that enables its wearer to slink through the shadows and assault unaware enemies.

Name: Deconstructor Recipe
Description: A bomb specially designed for dismantling machinery, sentient or otherwise.

Name: Electron Charge Recipe
Description: A small electro-explosive charge with mysterious origins. It is capable of generating a crippling vortex of electricity.

Name: Fiery Vaporizer Mk II Recipe
Description: A Fiery Vaporizer modified to disperse combustible material over a wider range.

Name: Freezing Vaporizer Mk II Recipe
Description: A Freezing Vaporizer modified to disperse ultra low-temperature chemicals over a wider range.

Name: Graviton Charge Recipe
Description: A small explosive charge with mysterious origins. It is capable of generating a vortex of crushing gravity.

Name: Haze Bomb Mk II Recipe
Description: A Haze Bomb modified to disperse noxious chemicals over a wider range.

Name: Lightning Capacitor Recipe
Description: An upgraded Capacitor that can explode with the fury of an electrical storm.

Name: Rock Salt Bomb Recipe
Description: A shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in rock salt. Not recommended for use in the kitchen.

Name: Slumber Smogger Mk II Recipe
Description: A Slumber Smogger modified to disperse sleepy smog over a wider range.

Name: Sun Shards Recipe
Description: A shard bomb formed from a small explosive encased in solar-charged Luminite. Whatever you do, don't look directly at it.

Name: Super Blast Bomb Recipe
Description: An upgraded Blast Bomb that combines an unstable heat source with untested explosive material to make one seriously unsafe package.

Name: Super Crystal Bomb Recipe
Description: A shard bomb stuffed with even more alloy. Apply directly to your foe's head.

Name: Super Dark Matter Bomb Recipe
Description: A shard bomb stuffed with even more Dark Matter. How much Dark Matter is too much? This much.

Name: Super Shard Bomb Recipe
Description: A shard bomb stuffed with even more depleted Crimsonite. The choicest cure for a combative creature is clearly a crystal to the cranium.

Name: Super Splinter Bomb Recipe
Description: A shard bomb stuffed with even more synthetic mineral. It can also be used to mince vegetables, if you don't mind picking the occasional crystal out of your teeth.

Name: Toxic Vaporizer Mk II Recipe
Description: A Toxic Vaporizer modified to disperse noxious agents over a wider range.

Name: Twisted Spine Cone Recipe

Name: Shadowsun Slicker Recipe
Description: An evil duster that is said to harbor a great power that feeds off of the unforgiven sins of its owners.

Name: Skolver Coat Recipe
Description: The ultimate in Wolver-hide clothing, this coat has been expertly crafted to give your melee attacks extra power.

Name: Starlit Demo Suit Recipe
Description: An advanced demolitions suit capable of resisting the strongest sleep mists. The soft glow is strangely stimulating.

Name: Starlit Hunting Coat Recipe
Description: An advanced, star-soaked hunting coat that will keep you awake even as it coddles you in downy comfort.

Name: Valkyrie Mail Recipe
Description: A priceless set of armor whose name denizens of the Underworld dare not mention.

Name: Vog Cub Coat Recipe
Description: This hide garment is so flame retardant that you won't even mind that it reeks of wood smoke.

Name: Volcanic Demo Suit Recipe
Description: Highly protective gear for the cutting-edge demolition man. The internal cooling system makes you feel a little like you've been cryogenically frozen.

Name: Volcanic Plate Mail Recipe
Description: Superior plate mail imbued with the elemental essence of flame and designed to withstand tremendous impact.

Name: Volcanic Salamander Suit Recipe
Description: A Salamander Suit reinforced with sturdy plates of volcanic iron. Extremely protective, and usable as a makeshift stove during long deployments.

Name: Ash of Agni Recipe
Description: When this bomb has left the battlefield in ashes, then, and only then, will your enemies have permission to die.

Name: Big Angry Bomb Recipe
Description: An immensely powerful bomb with a terrible attitude.

Name: Dark Briar Barrage Recipe
Description: A mythical object that can explode with the fury of the Snarbolax itself. The unearthly howl it produces is said to be more crippling than its blast.

Name: Deadly Crystal Bomb Recipe
Description: A large chunk of Moonstone and Valestone alloy primed with a potent explosive. Studies have shown that this bomb can be used to reduce a zombie's craving for brains by up to 100% by blowing them to pieces.

Name: Deadly Dark Matter Bomb Recipe
Description: A large chunk of Dark Matter primed with a potent explosive. This bomb would be in stark violation of the Spiral Order's safety handbook if they hadn't lost the last copy in the crash.

Name: Deadly Shard Bomb Recipe
Description: A large chunk of Crimsonite primed with a potent explosive. No more depleted Crimsonite here: this bomb's made with the good stuff! Or the bad stuff, if you happen to be the target.

Name: Deadly Splinter Bomb Recipe
Description: A large chunk of synthetic mineral primed with a potent explosive. Fact: the easiest way to find the splinter in the haystack is to blow up the haystack.

Name: Electron Vortex Recipe
Description: An Electron Bomb modified with a payload of unstable organic essence. Foes caught in its punishing blast radius are cruelly referred to as "thunderstuck".

Name: Graviton Vortex Recipe
Description: A Graviton Bomb fortified with potentially dangerous amounts of shadow steel. Its blast should draw your foes toward it... if it doesn't rip the entire universe in two, that is.

Name: Irontech Destroyer Recipe
Description: The big brother of the Irontech Bomb, the Destroyer unleashes the full potential of irontech power.

Name: Nitronome Recipe
Description: An advanced explosive issued to only the most elite Spiral Knight grenadiers. It's made from a synthetic substance that ticks ominously even when unarmed.

Name: Scintillating Sun Shards Recipe
Description: A large chunk of solar-charged Luminite primed with a potent explosive. The pyrotechnic show upon detonation is positively stunning.

Name: Shivermist Buster Recipe
Description: Originally used to flash freeze perishable supplies, the Shivermist Buster is far more satisfying when used to flash freeze monsters in their tracks.

Name: Shocking Salt Bomb Recipe
Description: A large chunk of rock salt primed with a potent explosive. For nutritional purposes, this particular chunk of salt has been enriched with dangerous amounts of electricity. Wait, what?

Name: Stagger Storm Recipe
Description: Though it was originally developed by the Spiral Order to harmlessly subdue dangerous species, how you deal with foes unfortunate enough to be caught in the storm is entirely up to you.

Name: Torpor Tantrum Recipe
Description: The ultimate sleep bomb. It's like a bedtime story, only more explodey.

Name: Venom Veiler Recipe
Description: The ultimate in toxic dispersal devices, the Venom Veiler can be used to destroy pests on crops. Failing that, it can also be used to destroy crops.

Name: Voltaic Tempest Recipe
Description: This high-tech, high voltage device is not recommended for use in water, around water, or near people thinking about water. To be safe, you probably shouldn't look at it, either.

Name: Arcana Recipe
Description: An exceptional handgun that fires powerful, elemental shots that many Spiral Knights refer to as 'magic missiles.'

Name: Argent Peacemaker Recipe
Description: An ancient handgun forged from sun silver. Its bullets serve as ushers for those that refuse to leave this world.

Name: Biohazard Recipe
Description: Be sure to check your armor's seals thoroughly before engaging in the operation of this weapon, or you may end up as miserable as your foes. Biohazard bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.

Name: Blitz Needle Recipe
Description: For when suppression just isn't good enough, the Blitz Needle specializes in "oppressive fire".

Name: Callahan Recipe
Description: A handgun of incredible power that can leave its target in a daze. It is said to make its targets feel far less lucky.  A charged shot can even pierce through multiple enemies.

Name: Gilded Griffin Recipe
Description: A beautiful pistol named after a great, noble beast. Its golden frame was believed to provide light within the impenetrable darkness of the Underworld.

Name: Grim Repeater Recipe
Description: Used only by the most elite of the Spiral Knight rangers, this devilish machine gun earned its name from the incredible speed in which it hands out shadowy tickets to the afterlife.

Name: Hail Driver Recipe
Description: Once you've seen the splitting bolts of unnaturally cold ice it produces, you'll understand why this Driver is hailed.

Name: Iron Slug Recipe
Description: Only the most frightening of foes can withstand the crippling paralysis caused by the magnum force of the Iron Slug's sudden impact. A charged shot can even pierce through multiple enemies.

Name: Magma Driver Recipe
Description: Spitting gobs of molten death at an alarming rate, this sublime sidearm is not recommended for use around (or on) anyone (or anything) that you happen to care deeply about.

Name: Neutralizer Recipe
Description: You'd be surprised at the number of practical applications to be had from two substances that, when combined, leave quite literally nothing in their wake. Neutralizer bullets envelop the enemy in an energy field that explodes after taking damage.

Name: Nova Driver Recipe
Description: It'll take more than a wish to save you if you're the unfortunate target of this all-powerful pistol with the strength of the stars themselves.

Name: Permafroster Recipe
Description: Tech Knights are not yet sure if targets of this deep-freezing handgun ever actually defrost. So far, 'no.' Permafroster shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Phantamos Recipe
Description: A powerful handgun brimming with dark energy. The Phantamos represents one of the most recent additions to the Spiral Knight's arsenal, as containing shadow energy of this degree took a great deal of research.

Name: Plague Needle Recipe
Description: Knights are divided on whether this gun's bolts pierce and then poison, or poison and then pierce. To the unlucky target, this distinction is irrelevant.

Name: Polaris Recipe
Description: It's said that the explosions caused by this stellar sidearm are so bright that you'll always be able to find your way in the darkness. Polaris shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Riftlocker Recipe
Description: A deadly handgun said to be capable of sundering heavy armor with a single shot. These firearms proved instrumental during the siege of Isora in breaking through the war machines of the Morai.

Name: Sentenza Recipe
Description: An ancient handgun forged from shadow steel. It is said to have been wielded by an evil one who possessed "angel eyes."

Name: Storm Driver Recipe
Description: The latent charge running through this supreme sidearm is strong enough to cause discomfort to anyone wielding it, and extreme discomfort to anyone shot by it.

Name: Supernova Recipe
Description: The destruction left in the wake of this peerless pistol is anything but nebulous. Supernova shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Umbra Driver Recipe
Description: This horrifyingly powerful handgun fires bullets that are completely devoid of color, odor and mercy.

Name: Valiance Recipe
Description: This high-performance handgun is a symbol of the Spiral Order, and is proudly worn by veteran members. As it is often said, a knight need not have courage: just Valiance.

Name: Volcanic Pepperbox Recipe
Description: When encamped in dangerous territory, the Volcanic Pepperbox is perfect for roasting both marshmallows and enemies.

Name: Wildfire Recipe
Description: An elite handgun that can offer a tremendous surprise for the enemy on the battlefield as its small charges of energy transform into raging wildfires. Wildfire shots become more powerful the further they travel.

Name: Winter Grave Recipe
Description: A tremendously powerful hand cannon whose moniker should come as no surprise to anyone who happens to be viewing it from the wrong end. A charged shot can even plow through multiple enemies.

Name: Ancient Plate Helm Recipe
Description: A vestigial helm whose weight makes it unwieldy to all but those with titanic strength.

Name: Azure Guardian Helm Recipe
Description: A noble helmet reserved for the most senior members of the Spiral Order. The technique which weaves dragon scale seamlessly into the metal is a closely guarded secret.

Name: Bombastic Demo Helm Recipe
Description: A finely-made helmet for the more discerning explosives expert. It won't tell you what kind of wine goes best with Nitronome, but it'll certainly keep your head looking good. And in one piece.

Name: Chaos Cowl Recipe
Description: A hood of dubious origin that shrouds its wearer in both mystery and elemental protection.

Name: Crown of the Fallen Recipe
Description: A cursed crown once worn by a celestial being cast down from paradise.

Name: Deadly Virulisk Mask Recipe
Description: A Virulisk Mask upgraded with an advanced toxin filter. It always smells like artificial pine needles on the inside.

Name: Deadshot Chapeau Recipe
Description: A mythical hat for those that never miss their mark. It's rumored to have been made from cloth that was previously interred.

Name: Divine Veil Recipe
Description: A heavenly hood of the style once worn by celestial sages.

Name: Dragon Scale Helm Recipe
Description: A mythical helmet crafted from the scales of a creature of legend.

Name: Dread Skelly Mask Recipe
Description: The ultimate in haunted headgear, certain to protect your cranium from even the most hellish of shadow attacks.

Name: Grey Feather Cowl Recipe
Description: A downy hood made for scholars who like to get out into the field. It's softer than the most luxurious of pillows, yet extraordinarily protective.

Name: Ironmight Plate Helm Recipe
Description: A superior plate helmet forged from an alloy of several rare metals. It'll restrict your peripheral vision a bit, but it's virtually impregnable.

Name: Justifier Hat Recipe
Description: A finely-made hat for handgun experts who think nothing of spending a few crowns more on a high-quality piece of gear.

Name: Mad Bomber Mask Recipe
Description: A sturdy helmet designed to keep out explosions, radio waves and high-tech mind control devices. At least, that's what they *want* you to think it does.

Name: Mercurial Helm Recipe
Description: A sublime silver helmet that'll let you move as swiftly as water, though perhaps not quite so swiftly *through* it.

Name: Nameless Hat Recipe
Description: A nameless hat worn by a nameless hero of legend.

Name: Royal Jelly Crown Recipe
Description: Ruggedly royal regalia recently reproduced from regally resinous remains.
