Name: Shadowsun Stetson Recipe
Description: A dashing hat for duelists who prefer to get their work done at midnight, rather than high noon.

Name: Skolver Cap Recipe
Description: A finely-made hide cap that's the perfect crown for any king of the wild frontier.

Name: Starlit Demo Helm Recipe
Description: An illuminated helm strengthened against soporific smogs. It's surprisingly soft inside.

Name: Starlit Hunting Cap Recipe
Description: An advanced hunting cap, illuminated and downy, that resists the strongest sleep mists.

Name: Valkyrie Helm Recipe
Description: A priceless helmet whose name denizens of the Underworld dare not mention.

Name: Vog Cub Cap Recipe
Description: A thick hat that smells heavily of barbecue. Barbecued what? Don't ask.

Name: Volcanic Demo Helm Recipe
Description: A cutting-edge helm reinforced with volcanic iron and designed for use with high-temperature explosives.

Name: Volcanic Plate Helm Recipe
Description: A superior plate helmet imbued with the elemental essence of flame. It's difficult to breathe in, but it can resist high temperatures and any number of savage attacks.

Name: Volcanic Salamander Mask Recipe
Description: A Salamander Mask reinforced with volcanic iron. In the field it can be used as a makeshift coffee pot, so long as you don't mind coffee that tastes a little like lizard.

Name: Aegis Recipe
Description: A sublime shield entrusted to only the most worthy members of the Spiral Order. Whether its crest is a relic from the Order of old or a creation from the Knights' time on Cradle is not immediately clear.

Name: Ancient Plate Shield Recipe
Description: An antique shield whose origins have been lost to the passing of time.

Name: Barbarous Thorn Shield Recipe
Description: A mythical shield imbued with the fury of the Snarbolax itself. It's said that the beast can use the glowing orbs on the shield's face to see and stalk weak-hearted wielders.

Name: Crest of Almire Recipe
Description: A shimmering crest once proudly carried by the noble knights of Almire. It is said to bless those who fight for their homeland, granting them strength from within.

Name: Dragon Scale Shield Recipe
Description: A mythical shield crafted from the scales of a creature of legend.

Name: Dread Skelly Shield Recipe
Description: A large, bony bulwark bathed in blackish brume. It occasionally issues a quiet, forlorn whisper, usually about remembering to block.

Name: Grey Owlite Shield Recipe
Description: A resplendent replica of the shield thought to have been issued to the most eminent of Owlite wizards. Wielding it fills you with righteous vengeance.

Name: Grey Owlite Shield Recipe
Description: A resplendent replica of the shield thought to have been issued to the most eminent of Owlite wizards. Wielding it fills you with righteous vengeance.

Name: Heater Shield Recipe
Description: A shield with a built-in furnace that keeps its user toasty warm, protecting them from most freeze attacks. Many knights also use it as a makeshift stove top when out in the field.

Name: Ironmight Plate Shield Recipe
Description: A superior shield forged from sun silver. The meaning of the crest on its face has been lost to time.

Name: Omega Shell Recipe
Description: A shield created from the armor of a Tortomega. The sheer weight of this powerful shield makes it only an option for the strongest of warriors.

Name: Royal Jelly Shield Recipe
Description: Prime protection for pretenders to the jelly throne.

Name: Volcanic Plate Shield Recipe
Description: A superior shield imbued with the elemental essence of flame. It is so resistant to high temperatures that it's a mystery how exactly it was forged in the first place.

Name: Acheron Recipe
Description: Striking with the savage power of the Underworld, this dark weapon has been known to drive weak-minded knights to the brink of madness.

Name: Amputator Recipe
Description: The culmination of slime family research, the heated reciprocating blades cut through all slimes with surgical precision and prevent their gelatinous bodies from reforming.

Name: Barbarous Thorn Blade Recipe
Description: A mythical blade that lashes out with the fury of the Snarbolax itself. Those who wield it claim to feel the fiery stare of the beast upon them whenever they close their eyes.

Name: Cold Iron Vanquisher Recipe
Description: A powerful cold iron blade forged for the singular purpose of hunting down and destroying the undead.

Name: Combuster Recipe
Description: Combining the principles of the Skylark's engines with the technology powering the Blast Furnace produced this brutal blade, which can ignite even the most flame-retardant materials at a distance.

Name: Divine Avenger Recipe
Description: An upgraded Avenger forged from the purest sun steel. There are few foes remaining in this world that are worthy enough to be defeated by such a fine blade, and there are still fewer heroes worthy of wielding it.

Name: Dread Venom Striker Recipe
Description: An assassin's armament whose edge causes deep wounds that seep with vitriol. You should probably store it separately from your snacks.

Name: Fearless Rigadoon Recipe
Description: The ultimate in paralyzing piercers, it's unclear whether its elegance or its wicked bite is what leaves opponents stupefied.

Name: Final Flourish Recipe
Description: The premier armament of the serious fencer, it can riposte just as easily as it can rip up foes.

Name: Furious Flamberge Recipe
Description: Great fencers can carve their name into their opponents. Legendary ones brand it there.

Name: Glacius Recipe
Description: Mixing some advanced theories on cryogenics with the technology powering the Cooling Chamber produced this advanced armament, which is capable of flash-freezing the most formidable of foes.

Name: Gran Faust Recipe
Description: An upgraded Faust forged from pristine-quality shadow steel. Its charge attacks are powerful enough to curse its wielder, but that hasn't stopped Devilites from treasuring these rare blades even more highly than their meager vacation time.

Name: Leviathan Blade Recipe
Description: A rare treasure of the Spiral Order, the blows from this mythical sword are said to rain down upon its victims like the water from a tidal wave.

Name: Sudaruska Recipe
Description: A rugged weapon for the knight who is more than willing to trade style and panache for ridiculous amounts of blunt force trauma.

Name: Triglav Recipe
Description: No stories have been told about this almighty blade, but that's only because people are rarely in the mood to talk after having been crushed by a mountain.

Name: Turbillion Recipe
Description: An ostentatious mechanized blade whose turbine crackles with the power of a thousand storms.

Name: Voltedge Recipe
Description: Combining Spiral capacitor technology with samples recovered from the Ironclaw Munitions Factory produced this blade, which can output a particularly hazardous 1.21 gigawatt discharge.

Name: Wild Hunting Blade Recipe
Description: A legendary cutter feared by even the mightiest of Wolvers and Chromalisks.

Name: Cake Slice
Description: A slice of cake that serves as a trophy from victory over a horde of Creep Cakes.  Head Chef Biscotti affirms that both these trophies and the incident that created them never officially occurred.

Name: Brittle Candy
Description: A piece of candy made to celebrate the Dark Harvest Festival.  It can be exchanged in the Haven Town Square for various costume masks.

Name: Chewy Candy
Description: A piece of candy made to celebrate the Dark Harvest Festival.  It can be exchanged in the Haven Town Square for various costume masks.

Name: Hard Candy
Description: A piece of candy made to celebrate the Dark Harvest Festival.  It can be exchanged in the Haven Town Square for various costume masks.

Name: Sour Candy
Description: A piece of candy made to celebrate the Dark Harvest Festival.  It can be exchanged in the Haven Town Square for various costume masks.

Name: Sticky Candy
Description: A piece of candy made to celebrate the Dark Harvest Festival.  It can be exchanged in the Haven Town Square for various costume masks.

Name: Sweet Candy
Description: A piece of candy made to celebrate the Dark Harvest Festival.  It can be exchanged in the Haven Town Square for various costume masks.

Name: Core Fragment
Description: A fragment of strange material found within the core of the Clockworks. Each fragment seems to have an entirely unique composition, like snowflakes. These fragments are highly prized by Spiral HQ as they hope to learn the nature of the core through their study.

Name: Forge Spark
Description: A small wisp of the essential spirit of technology and progress. It is of extreme value to the Spiral Order. Take it to the Token Trader in the Haven Bazaar!

Name: Grim Spark
Description: A small wisp of the essential spirit of darkness and decay. It is of extreme value to the Spiral Order. Take it to the Token Trader in the Haven Bazaar!

Name: Ancient Page
Description: A crumbling page torn from a long-forgotten grimoire of the Moorcroft Manor archives. The indecipherable language written upon it glows faintly in the dark as if containing power in its very words.

Name: Jelly Gem
Description: Typically only carried by jelly royalty, these squishy gems are the official currency of the jelly kingdoms. Though highly prized by slimes, most other creatures simply eat them as they are quite delicious.

Name: Krogmo Coin
Description: A coin issued by the great King Krogmo to participants in his Coliseum.  It can be exchanged for prizes from the Coliseum Rewards Supervisor.

Name: Ancient Page
Description: A crumbling page torn from a long-forgotten grimoire of the Moorcroft Manor archives. The indecipherable language written upon it glows faintly in the dark as if containing power in its very words.

Name: Primal Spark
Description: A small wisp of the essential spirit of nature. It is of extreme value to the Spiral Order. Take it to the Token Trader in the Haven Bazaar!

Name: Bark Module
Description: A special circuit board developed by gremlin engineers designed to enhance both the bark and bite of the Roarmulus Twins.

Name: Frumious Fang
Description: A long, razor-sharp tooth plucked from the mouth of a Snarbolax; a memento representing a Knight's triumph over the monstrous stalker of the Gloaming Wildwoods.

Name: Apocrean Sigil
Description: An otherworldly brand placed upon a soul claimed by the mysterious Apocrea. Removing it allows the captured soul to escape imprisonment within the terrible realm of the Apocrea.

Name: Almirian Seal
Description: A seal from the lost kingdom of Almire, proof that the keeper braved the ever-burning abyss known as the Firestorm Citadel.

Name: Blue Winter Wish
Description: A tiny wishlist created by one of the children of Emberlight. It signifies that you fufilled their holiday wishes and saved Winterfest. Doesn't that just fill you with cheer?

Name: Green Winter Wish
Description: A tiny wishlist created by one of the children of Emberlight. It signifies that you fufilled their holiday wishes and saved Winterfest. Doesn't that just fill you with cheer?

Name: Red Winter Wish
Description: A tiny wishlist created by one of the children of Emberlight. It signifies that you fufilled their holiday wishes and saved Winterfest. Doesn't that just fill you with cheer?

Name: White Winter Wish

Name: Shadow Key
Description: A mysterious key that grants a party entrance to Shadow Lairs.  A Shadow Key is destroyed once used.

Name: Silver Key
Description: A special key that can open any lockbox.  Once used, the key is destroyed.

Name: Slime Key
Description: A slippery key that can only open a Slime Lockbox.  Once used, the key is destroyed.

Name: Guild Master Door
Description: Installs a force barrier at the entrance of the room that can only be passed by the Guild Masters of the guild.

Name: Member Door
Description: Installs a force barrier at the entrance of the room that can only be passed by guild members of Member rank and up.

Name: Open Doorway
Description: Removes any door presently installed and leaves the room open for anyone to enter.

Name: Officer Door
Description: Installs a force barrier at the entrance of the room that can only be passed by guild members of Officer rank and up.

Name: Veteran Door
Description: Installs a force barrier at the entrance of the room that can only be passed by guild members of Veteran rank and up.

Name: Default Environment
Description: The default environment that really captures the stale air of the Clockworks.

Name: Falling Embers Environment
Description: An environment that fills your Guild Hall with falling ash and soot as if Vog himself had passed through.

Name: Rain Shower Environment
Description: The perfect environment for Guild Halls without fire insurance or whose members are simply too lazy to ever water their plants.

Name: Rain Storm Environment
Description: A environment with almost too much rain.

Name: Snowfall Environment
Description: A beautiful environment that fills your Guild Hall with perfect snow: the kind that gently falls from the sky and never collects on the ground, melting into gray muck.

Name: 2F Central War Room
Description: An expansion that adds a large central meeting room to the Guild Hall.

Name: 4F Landing
Description: An expansion that adds a small central room to the Guild Hall.

Name: 1F East Wing
Description: An expansion that adds two rooms to the eastern side of the Guild Hall.

Name: 2F East Wing
Description: An expansion that adds two rooms and a small overlook to the eastern side of the Guild Hall.

Name: 3F East Wing
Description: An expansion that adds two rooms and a small overlook to the eastern side of the Guild Hall.

Name: 4F East Wing
Description: An expansion that adds three rooms and a small overlook to the eastern side of the Guild Hall.

Name: 5F East Wing
Description: An expansion that adds two rooms to the eastern side of the Guild Hall.

Name: 1F West Wing
Description: An expansion that adds two rooms to the western side of the Guild Hall.

Name: 2F West Wing
Description: An expansion that adds two rooms and a small overlook to the western side of the Guild Hall.

Name: 3F West Wing
Description: An expansion that adds two rooms and a small overlook to the western side of the Guild Hall.

Name: 4F West Wing
Description: An expansion that adds three rooms and a small overlook to the western side of the Guild Hall.

Name: 5F West Wing
Description: An expansion that adds two rooms to the western side of the Guild Hall.

Name: Alchemy Room
Description: A utilitarian room equipped with two Alchemy Machines and a General Goods Merchant.

Name: Auction Room
Description: A businesslike room providing access to the Haven Auction House.

Name: Bechamel's Makeover Studio
Description: A trendy room where Bechamel can add or remove Accessories from your favorite equipment.

Name: Coliseum Room
Description: A lively room featuring a Coliseum ticket booth, a Coliseum Rewards Supervisor, and a Krogmo Alchemy Machine.

Name: Empty Room
Description: An empty Guild Hall room with standard flooring and plenty of space for furniture!

Name: Empty Industrial Room
Description: An empty Guild Hall room with industrial flooring and plenty of space for furniture!

Name: Empty Patchwork Room
Description: An empty Guild Hall room with mixed flooring and plenty of space for furniture!

Name: Empty Checkerboard Room
Description: An empty Guild Hall room with a checkerboard pattern on the floor.

Name: Empty Chess Room
Description: An empty room with an 8x8 chess board in the corner and a row for spectators.

Name: Tranquil Snipe Garden
Description: A peaceful garden home to a number of Snipes. Perfect for both relaxing and spinning wildly in place.

Name: Hunter's Lodge
Description: A monster hunting lodge curated by the great hunter, Armero. Contains a guild alchemy machine containing monster trophy recipes. Guild alchemy machines use resources from the Guild Treasury and deposit results into the Guild Treasury.

Name: Punch & Vise's Workshop
Description: A busy room where Punch and Vise can be called upon to unbind and rework your equipment.

Name: Private Training Hall
Description: A simple room providing access to a private guild training hall, perfect for learning new skills or keeping old ones current.

Name: Default Theme
Description: The default Guild Hall theme.

Name: m.def_light(Blast Furnace Theme)
Description: A fiery theme that's sure to keep your Guild Hall warm and toasty... or sweaty.

Name: Extra Blast Furnace Theme
Description: A fiery theme that's sure to keep your Guild Hall warm and toasty... or sweaty.

Name: Blast Furnace Theme
Description: A fiery theme that's sure to keep your Guild Hall warm and toasty... or sweaty.

Name: m.def_light(Cooling Chamber Theme)
Description: A frosty theme that turns Guild Halls into a popular retreat during the warm, summer months on Cradle.

Name: Extra Cooling Chamber Theme
Description: A frosty theme that turns Guild Halls into a popular retreat during the warm, summer months on Cradle.

Name: Cooling Chamber Theme
Description: A frosty theme that turns Guild Halls into a popular retreat during the warm, summer months on Cradle.

Name: m.def_light(Wasteworks Theme)

Name: Curse Vial
Description:
A glass vial containing concentrated fiend essence. It can be used to inflict enemies with Curse.

Throw it like a grenade and give your foes 10 years of bad luck!

Description:
A glass vial containing a molten mixture. It can be used to inflict enemies with Fire.

Throw it like a grenade and turn 'em into toast!

Name: Freeze Vial
Description:
A glass vial containing glacial wind. It can be used to inflict enemies with Freeze.

Throw it like a grenade and chill your foes right in place!

Description:
A glass vial containing debilitating toxins. It can be used to inflict enemies with Poison.

Throw it like a grenade and wither the attack power of your foes!

A glass vial containing hyper-charged electric fluids. It can be used to inflict enemies with Shock.

Throw it like a grenade and give your foes a real ZAP!

Name: Roarmulus Blueprints
Description: A liberated set of schematics showing off the complete spec and scale of Project Roarmulus.

Name: Jelly Gem
Description: A squishy gem highly prized by slimes. This one was liberated from the Royal Jelly Palace and painstakingly preserved as a conversation piece.

Name: Frumious Fang
Description: A long, razor-sharp tooth, proof that you encountered the fabled Snarbolax and survived to galumph back.

Name: Almirian Seal
Description: A magnificently preserved royal seal of the lost kingdom of Almire. It probably belongs in a museum.

Name: Crash Pod
Description: A piece of Spiral technology used to escape disabled starships. They're very cramped inside.

Name: Small Replica Roarmulus Twin
Description: A miniature model of one of the Roarmulus Twins. It is mercifully inactive.

Name: Royal Jelly Crown
Description: A jolly piece of jewelry formerly borne by the Royal Jelly himself. It is jauntily perched on a gelatinous pillow.

Name: Replica Natural Snarbolax
Description: A small Snarbolax statuette, showing the savage shadow in a stunned state.

Name: Lord Vanaduke's Mask
Description: The sinister mask formerly worn by Vanaduke, Lord of the Firestorm Citadel. It's far too big for a knight to wear.

Name: Scaredy Chromalisk
Description: A timid chromalisk that seems to have lost its tongue.
